chapters.text: Abraham chapa, David chapa, Jesu Christa khanggui thubu.
Abraham in Isaac ahingin, Isaac’in Jacob ahingin, Jacob’in Judah le asopite ahingin,
Judah le ajinu Tamarin Perez le Zerah ahing lhone; Perez’in Hezron ahingin, Hezronin Ram ahingin,
Ram in Amminadab ahingin, Amminadab’in Nahshon ahingin, Nahshon in Salmon ahingin,
Salmon in ajinu Rahab toh Boaz ahing lhone; Boaz le ajinu Ruth-in Obed ahing lhonin, Obed chun Jesse ahinge;
Jesse’in David lengpa ahingin ahi.
Chuin David le Uriah inneipin Solomon ahing lhonin, Solomon in Rehoboam ahingin, Rehoboam in Abijah ahingin, Abijah-in Asa ahingin,
Asa in Jehoshaphat ahingin, Jehoshaphat’in Joram ahingin, Joram in Uzziah ahingin,
Uzziah-in Jotham ahing in, Jotham in Ahaz ahingin, Ahaz’in Hezekiah ahingin,
Hezekiah-in Manasseh ahingin, Manasseh-in Amon ahingin, Amon in Josiah ahingin,
Josiah-in Jechoniah le asopiho Babylon gama atolmang laiyun ahingin ahi.
Chuin Babylona atolmang nungun Jechoniah-in Shealtiel ahingin, Shealtiel’in Zerubbabel ahingin,
Zerubbabel’in Abiud ahingin, Abiud’in Eliakim ahingin, Eliakim in Azor ahingin,
Azorin Zadok ahingin, Zadok-in Achim ahingin, Achim in Eliud ahingin;
EJiud’in Eleazar ahingin, Eleazar in Matthan ahingin, Matthan in Jacob ahingin,
Jacob’in Mariam inneipu Joseph ahingin, hiche Mariam sunga chu Christa kiti Jesu chu penga ahi.

Hitichun khang agomin Abrahama pat David geiyin khang som le khang li ahin, David a pat Babylon gama atolmang geiyun khang som le khang li, chule Babylon gama atolmanguva pat Christa pen gei khang som le khang li ahi.
Jesu Christa pen umchan chu hiti ahi. Anu Mariam Joseph-in aji dinga ahol ahin, akigop masang lhonin amanu chu Lhagao Thenga kona agai akihedoh tan ahi.
Ahivangin ainneipu Joseph chu mi chonpha tah ahijeh-in lhangphonga japi seithang in aumsah nom hih-in guhthima kikhenpi ding lung angaitotan ahi.

Aman lung achuti ngaito laitah-in, veuvin, Pakai vantil khat’in amangin akimusah-in ajah a, “David chapa Joseph, nainneipi Mariam gakipuilut ding olmo hih-in, ijeh-inem itile ama Lhagao Thenga kona gaiya ahi.
Amanu soh-intin chapa khat ahin ding ahi, hitin amin Jesu nasah ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile amatah chun amite achonset’uva kona ahuhhing ding ahi.
Pakaiyin themgao kama asei thu,

‘Veuvin, nu ngah chu hung gaiyin tin chapa khat ahin ding ahi, chule amin Emmanuel asah ding ahi,’ ati. @9(Hichu Pathenin eiumpiuve, tina ahi)@7’ tia asei chu gui lhunna dinga thu hicheng chu soh a ahi,” ati.
Chuin Joseph aihmut akhangin akipat’in Pakai Vantil’in thu apeh bang chun abol’in ainneipi chu akichenpin ahi;
ahivangin aso kahsen kitoh khahpi louhel’in aumin; chuin acha chu amin Jesu asah tai.
Herod lengpa lal laiyin Judea gama Bethlehem khopiah Jesu apengtan ahile, veuvin niso lama konin ahsi lekha themho phabep Jerusalema ahungun, “Judate lengpa apengin ahi, ama chu hoi lam ham?
Keihon nisolamah a-ahsi kamu uvin, chibai bola hung kahiuve,” atiuvin ahi.
Herod lengpan chuche thu ajah phat’in amati Jerusalem miteti alungu ajingtan ahi.
Chuphat’in thempu pipuiho le miho danthu sun ho chu akhomin, “Christa hoiya peng ding ham?” tin adongin ahi.
Amahon ajah a, “Judea gam Bethlehem a peng ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile

Vo Bethlehem Judea gam. Judah vaipote lah a nangma itinama jongle aneopen nahipoi; ijeh-inem itile nalah a kona vaipo khat kamite Israelte ching ding chu pengdoh ding ahi, tin themgao seiya konin akisune,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin Herod’in ahsi lekha themho chu guh thimin akouvin ahsi so phat chu kichen tah-in ahetoh tan ahi.

Chuin amaho chu Bethlehem a asol’in, “Cheuvin lang naosen chung chang thudol chu chentah-in ga-dong toh uvin; chule namudoh tengule keima jong kachea chibai kagaboh theina dingin thu hinpo kit’uvin,” ati.
Lengpa thu ajah phat’un amaho akipatdoh tauvin ahi; chule veuvin, niso lama amuu ahsi chu amasanguva achepeh-in naosen umna chunga chun aki ngan ahi.
Ahsi chu amu phat’uvin athau anomin hapan aki-pah un ahi.

Chuin amaho in sunga alut’un ahile naosen chu anu Mariam toh amuthauvin ahile, aboh khup’un ama chu chibai aboh tauvin ahi; chuin athillu bom cheh-u asolhauvin, kipa manin sana, bego chule myrrh ama chu apetauvin ahi.
Chujouvin amanguva Herod heng lama a kite kit louna dinguva Pathenin ahil chah jeh uvin lam chom ahovin agam lamuva ache mang tauvin ahi.

Chuin amaho chedoh nungin, veu-vin, Joseph amangin Pakai Vantil khat’in “Thouvin lang naosen le anu puiyin lang Egypt gama jam lutpi tan, chule thu kapeh hahsen chua chun um jingin, ijeh-inem itile Herod’in naosen chu suh mang dinga a hol ding ahi” ati.
Chuin ama janin athoudoh-in naosen le anu akipuiyin Egypt gam ajontan ahi.
Ahin Herod thi kah sen hi a chun aumin; Pakaiyin themgao kama asei, ‘Egypt gama konin ka-Chapa kakouve,’ ati chu gui-lhunna dinga chuti ahi.

Chuin Herod ahsi lekha themhon alhim lhah-u ahi akihetdoh phat’in alung hang behseh-in mi asol’in ahsi lekha them hoa kona aphat ahetchen dungjui chun Bethlehem a le akimvelse sea pasal’chapang kum nia lhah noilamse athattan ahi.
Hichun themgao Jeremiah thusei.
“Ramah a akap le amao ogin akijai; Rachel’in achate akakan, aum lou jeh uvin lhepbi ding anomtapon ahi,” ati chu gui lhunga ahitai.
Ahivangin Herod athi phat’in veu-vin, Pakai Vantil khat’in Egypt gamah Joseph mangin akimusah-in.
‘Thouvin lang naosen le anu kipuiyin Israel gam lama chetan; naosen tha ding gote ho chu athitauve,” ati.
Chuin ama akipat doh-in naosen le anu akipuiyin Israel gam lama ahung kittai.
Ahivangin Judea gamah Archelaus apa Herod khel’in vai apoi ti ajan, chulama ache ngamta hih-in; amang-a aki hilchah jeh-in akipat’in Galilee gamah akile heitai.
Chuin amachu Nazareth mi kiti ding ahi tia themgao hon asei chu guilhun thei nan achen Nazareth khopiah achengtan ahi.
Chulai chun John Baptist ahungin,
“Nalung heiyun van gam anaitai,” tin Judea gam gamthip’ah thu alhangsam len ahi.
Isaiah themgaovin, “Gamthip’a khosam o khat’in, ‘Pakai lamlen semtoh-san koiyun, alampi semjangun,’ tin aseiye,” tia asei chu ama hi ahi.
John chu apon-ah sa ngongsao mul ahin, akong’ah savun konggah akigah-in ahi.
Chule a an neh ma chu khao le gam khoiju ahi. Chuphat’in Jerusalem le Judea gam jousea mi, chule Jordan vel gamkol sung jousea mi ahenga ache cheuvin achonset nau cheh aphongun;
Jordan lui dunga chun ama khut’a baptize achang tauvin ahi.
Ahin Pharisee ho le Sudducee ho mi tamtah ama khut’a baptize chang dinga ahungu amun ajah uva, “Vo gulse son ho, khonunga lunghanna hung lhung dinga kona jamna ding lungthim koiham na-peuva?
Hijeh chun lungheitoh kilomin gadoh-un;
chule nalah-uva ‘Abraham kapuluiyu aum nai,’ tin ngaito hih-un; ijeh-inem itile tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, hiche songhoa kona hi Pathenin Abraham chate sodoh sah thei ahi.
Chule tu jeng jongin thing bultinah heicha kikoiya ahitai. Chutia chu thingphung aga phalou chengse chu kiphuh lhua meiya kisep lutji ahi.

Lungheina dinga keiman twiya baptize kachansah bou ahi; amavang kanunga hungpa keima sanga chungnung-jo ahi; keima akengchot choi dinga jong kilom kahipoi. Amatah chun nang ho Lhagao Theng le meiya baptize nachansah dingu ahi.
Aman akhut’a godal achoiye; aman aphol jap ngimsel’intin, achang apang sunga khumin tin, asi vang chu mei mit thei louva agovam ding ahi,” ati.
Hichepet chun Jesu John khut’a baptize chang din gin Galilee a konin John hengah Jordan lamah ahungin ahi.
Ahivangin John anathuphan, “Nangma khut’a ka chan ding joh sih a nangma kahenga hung nahim,” ati.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in “Tun hisah pou poutan; ijeh-inem itile chonphatna jouse abancha hitia hi ibulhit ding dol ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesu baptize achan jouvin twilah a konin apotdoh paitan ahi; chuin veuvin, ama dingin van kot akihongin, chule Pathen Lhagao vakhu banga ahung lenlhah a achunga ahung chuh amun;
chuin, “Ama hi kachapa deitah ahi; achunga kalung alhai ta ngeiye,” tin vana konin o ahung gingin ahi.
Hichun Jesu diabol lhep patep’a um dingin gamthip a Lhagao puitouvin aumtan ahi.
Chuin ni som li le jan som li an angol’a aum jouvin agil akeltan ahi.
Chuin apateppa chu ahenga ahungin ajah a, “Nangma Pathen Chapa nahile hiche song ho hi changlhah asona dingin thu pen,” ati.
Ahin aman adonbut’in “Mihem changlhah jenga hing louding ahi, Pathen kamsunga kona thu pot chengsea bou hing ding ahi, hiti chun akisune,” ati.
Chuphat’in diabol’in ama chu khopi theng lama apuiyin Pathen houin tingvuma chun adinsah-in ajah a,

“Pathen Chapa nahile nangma kileh lha jengin; ijeh-inem itile A man nangma chung changah Avantil ho thu pentin, ama hon akhut’uva nadop dingu ahi; achuti lou le songah nakeng kisuh kha nate; tin akisune,” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Pakai na-Pathen patep hih-in, hiti jong hin akisune,” ati.
Diabol’in ama molsang tah chunga apui kit’in, vannoi leiset gam le aloupina jouse jong avetsah-in; chuin ama jah a,
“Nakhup boh a nalhuh a chibai neiboh a ahile hichengse hi penge,” atin ahi.
Chutah-in Jesun ajah a, “Chemang in, Satan; ijeh-inem itile hitin akisune, ‘Pakai na-Pathen-chu chibai boh-in lang ama jeng bou houvin,’ akiti,” ati.
Chuphat’in diabol’in a ma adalhatai; chuin veuvin, Vantil ho ahungun ama chu ahung jenleutauvin ahi.
Chuin John amantauve, ti ajah phat’in Galilee gam lama achen;
chuin Nazareth adalhan Zebulun le Naphtali gamkai sunga dillen panga Capernaum khoa achen agachengin ahi;
Isaiah themgaovin asei,
“Zebulun le Naphtali gam, dillen lam, chule Jordan gal lang khat gamkol, chidang namdangte Galilee, muthim lah a touho chun vah loupi tah amutauve,
chule thina gam le alima tou ho chu, achunguva kho avahtai,” ati chu guilhunna dinga chuti ahitai.
Hiche laiya pat chun Jesun thu ahillhang len, “Nalung heiyun, van gam anaitai,” ati.
Chujouvin ama Galilee dillen panga avale pet’in Peter kiti Simon le anaopa Andrew dillen a len ase lhon amun; amani chu nga man mi ahilhone.
Chuin aman amanijah a, “Kanung hinjui lhonin, keiman nangni mi man len sep’in sem lhon inge,” ati.
Chuin amanin alen adalha lhonin anung ajuipai jeng lhontai.
Chuin ama chukoma kon chun achepaiyin ahile midang ucha nima, Zebedee chapa Jacob le anaopa John apau Zebedee toh kong sunga alenu anakhui phat’u amun amani ma chu akouvin ahi.
Chuin amanin chupettah chun akongle apa lhon adalha lhonin ama nung ajuipai jeng lhon tai.
Chuin Jesu Galilee gamse sea avah le avah len akikhop nau in tinah thu ahillen, gamsung Kipana Thupha ahil lhang len, miho ahivei jouseu chule adamlou jouse adamsah tan ahi.
Hichun Syria gama amin akithangin; thilhavop, abuh thi, langthi, ima hivei chom chom veiya anat thoh lel jouse ahenga ahin puiyun, aman amaho chu aboldam soh keiyin ahi.
Chuin Galilee, Decapolis, Jerusalem, chule Judea gama kon le Jordan gal lang khat lama konin mihon tamtah-in anung ajuitan ahi.
Aman mipi chengse chu amun mol chunga akaltouvin; chunin ama atouvin ahile aseijuite chu ahenga ahunguvin;
chuin ama apaodoh-in amaho chu hiche thu hi ahil pan tan ahi.
“Lhagaova vaichaho anun nom ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile van gam chu amahoa ahi.
Alhaseteho anun nom ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile lhep lung monga um ding ahiuve.
Mi lung nengte ho anun nom ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile amahon leiset alo dingu ahi.
Chonphatna lama gilkel le dang chah ho anun nom ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu va ding ahiuve.
Mi lungsette ho anun nom ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu kilungset ding ahiuve.
Mi lung theng ho anun nom ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile amahon Pathen amu dingu ahi.
Mi sucham ho anun nom ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu Pathen chate kiti ding ahiuve.
Chonphat jal’a bolsetna thoh ho anun nom ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile van gam chu amahoa ahi.
Keima jal’a mihon nahouset’uva nabolset’uva chule nachunguva jouthua thu gilou asei tengule anun nom nahiuve.
Kipah-un hapan kipah-un; ijeh-inem itile vanah nasan dingu kipaman atam e; ijeh-inem itile nang ho masanga ana um themgao ho jong chu mihon chutobangma chun abolseuvin ahi.
“Nang ho leiset chi nahiuve, ahin chi khu tamta hen lang hile ipia kialsah ding ham? Chukalle apanna um tapon tin paidoh le mihemte chotpha ding bou ahitai.
Nang ho vannoi vah nahiuve. Lhang vuma khopi chu akisel theipoi.
Min meivah avah-in lo akhu khum ngaipoi, atunna chunga akoiyin, chuteng insunga um chengse chu asalvah bouvin ahi.
Hiche bang chun navah-u chu miho ang-an kilang hen, chuteng amahon nachonphat nau chu mu theiyun tin chule vana um na-Pau chu avahchoi dingu ahi.
“Keima danthu le themgao ho thu sumang dinga hungin nei ngaito hih-un; asumanga hung hilouvin asubulhit ding joh-a hung kahibouve.
Ijeh-inem itile tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, van le lei aman kahse le aboncha abulhin masang-sea danthu chu jem sipah pen le ajem halsi cha jong mang louding ahi.

Hijeh chun koi hijongle hiche thupeh neopen lah a khat susea chule chutobanga bol ding hila chu van gama aneopena kisei ding ahi; chule koi hijongle anit’a chule chutobanga hila vang chu van gama alenpena kisei ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, nang ho danthu sun ho le Pharisee ho sanga nachonphat nau achung nun joh loule van gama nalut louhel dingu ahi.
“Tol that hih-in; koi hijongle tolthat chu thupi tanna a dinga kicha jinga um ding ahi, tia malai mite jah a kisei thu chu najatauve.

Ahivangin keiman nang ho jah a kasei ahi, ‘Koi hijongle asopi lunghana chu thupi tanna a dinga kicha jinga um ding ahi; chule koi hijongle asopi jah a, ‘Pannabei’ tia chu hou vaipoloi kikhopna a ding kicha jinga um ding ahi. Chule koi hijongle asopi, ‘Mi ngol,’ tia chu damun meidil a dinga kicha jinga um ding ahi.
Hiche jeh chun maicham muna thil to ding nachoiya nahung tengle nasopi nachunga alung himo na nahetdoh a ahile nathil to ding chu maicham koma chun dalhan lang chen,
nasopi chutoh gakicham masan, chujou le hungin nathil to ding chu toh-in.
Nahehpa chu lampia naum pet’in kichampin, achutiloule na-hehpan thutan vaihom henga leh lut’in natin, thutan vaihom chun sottolle khut’ ah pedoh in natin, chuteng aman songkul’a nakhum ding ahi.
Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahi, nangman achainakei paisa keh khat geiya nasah soh masangsea iti jongle chua kona napotdoh louhel ding ahi.
‘Jon thanhoi bol hih-in’ tia kisei chu nang hon najatauve; ahivangin keiman nangho kaseipeh nahiuve.
Koi hijongle numei jon lunga vea chu amanu chutoh alunga jonga ahitai.
Chule namit jet lamin nasuhmo le kaldoh-in lang pai mangin; ijeh-inem itile natahsa pumpi damuna le lut’a aum sangin natibah khat aman nangma dingin aphajoi.
Chule nakhut jetlam in nasuhmo le hi jong chu sat lhan lang pai mangin, natahsa pumpia damun a nachuh sangin natibah khat aman nang dinga phajo ahi.
“Chule ‘Koi hijongle aji ada le dana lekha pehen,’ kitisa ahi;
ahivangin kei-man najah uva kasei ahi, Ajon jeh tailouva thu dang jeh-a aji da a chun ajinu chu ajonsah ahi; chule koi hile akidasa numei chu akichenpia jong chu ajonga ahi.
“Chukit le ‘Jouvin kihahsel hih-un, nakihahselna chu Pakai henga molson,’ tia malai mite jah a kiseisa chu najatauve;
ahivangin keiman najah uva kasei ahi. ‘Imachan kihahsel hih-in, van min panin kihahsel hih-in, Pathen touna ahijeh-in;
chule lei min panin kihahsel hih-in, ijeh-inem itile hichu akengto ngapna ahi. Jerusalem min panin kihahsel hih-in; ijeh-inem itile hichu Leng chungnung khopi ahi.
Naluchang panin kihahsel hih-in; ijeh-inem itile nangman nasam jang khat jeng cha jong nakansah navomsah theipon ahi.
Ahin nasei chu ahile ahi, ahiloule ahilou hijeng hen; hicheng kal’a chu agilouva kona bou ahitai.
“Mit khel’a mit, ha khel’a ha, tia kisei chu najatauve;
ahivangin keiman nangho jah a kasei ahi, ‘Migilou thuh hih-un; amavang koi hile nangeiphe jet lam benga chu langkhat jong dopeh-in.
Koi hile heh dinga goa nasangkhol sungnung lah dinga goa chu naponlen jong chu pe jengin.
Koi hile apoh po dinga nacham louva bol’a mile khat napuiya chu mile ni che-pin.
Nahenga thuma chu pen, nahenga thilpa thuma chu kihei mangsan hih-in.
‘Naheng nakom ngailun lang chule namelmateu hot bol’un,’ tia kisei chu najatauve;
ahivangin keiman nangho jah a kasei ahi, ‘Namelmateu ngailu’uvin, chule nabolseteu dingin taopeh-un; chutile bou van a na-Pau chate hitheiyun nate;
ijeh-inem itile aman migilou le mipha chunga anisa asosah gel’in chule michonpha le michonse chunga go ajuhsah gel’in ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile nanghon na ngailuteu jeng chu nangailut’uva ahile ipi kipaman nasan dingu ham?
Kaidong hon jong chutima chu abolu hilou ham? Chule nasopiu jengmai salam naboh uva ahile midang ipia nakhel nau umam? Chidang namdang ten jong chutia chu abol lou ham?
Hijeh chun van a um na-Pau aphat chamkimsoh bangin nangho jong chamkimsoh-un.
Nachonphat nau chu mihon amuna dinguvin amasanguva nabol louna dinguvin ching theiyun; chutia nabol ule vana na-Pau koma san ding kipaman nei lou nahiuve.

Hijeh chun mi thil napeh teng mi pachat ding ngaito nan mipha lhem ho bangin kikhopna in tin le lam dungah namasang sanguva sumkon mut hih-un; tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, amaho chun kipaman akisanu ahitai.
Nangma vangin mi thil napeh teng nakhut jet lamin abol chu nakhut veilam hetsah hin-in,
chutile bou nathilpeh chu guh thim hintin, guh thima mua na-Pan nangma nasah ding ahi.

“Nang ho Pathen henga natao tengule mipha lhem ho toh bang hih-un, amahon mi mu dingin kikhopna in tin le lamkon tin a din a tao adeiyun ahi. Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, amaho chun kipaman akisanu ahitai.
Nang vang natao tengle na insung dan a lut’in lang chule kot khah-in guhthima um na-Pa henga taovin, chuteng guhthima mua na-Pan nangma nasah ding ahi.
Amavang chidang namdang te bangin naseisa velsei kit hih-un, ijeh-inem itile amahon thu tamtah sei chu japhante, ti angaitouvin ahi.
Hijeh chun amahotoh bang hih-un; ijeh-inem itile nathum masangun nadei na ngai chanu chu na-Pauvin ahenai.
Hijeh chun hiti hin taovun; ‘Vana um ka-Pau namin kijahen,
nagam hung lhung hen. Vana nalungchan akim bangin leiyajong nalung chan kimhen.
Tunin kaneh khop dingu anneh neipeuvin.
Kalei bateu ka ngaidam bangun keiho bat jong ngaidam in.
Chule lhepna a neipui hihun, agilouva konin neihuhdoh jouvin.
Ijeh-inem itile nanghon mi suh khel na ngaidamuva ahile van a na-Pau jongin nangho suh khel angaidam ding ahi.
Amavang nang hon mi suh khel na ngaidam lou vang ule, na-Pauvin jong nangho suh khel angaidam lou ding ahi.

“Nanghon an na ngol tengule mipha lhem ho bangin kinguisah hih-un, ijeh inem itile amahon an angolu min ahetna dingin amaiso achom ahisah jiuvin ahi. Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, amahon kipaman akisanu ahitai.
Nangma vangin an na ngol tengle na-an ngol chu mi hetsah louvin, guhthima um na-Pa chu na an ngol hetsah theina dingin nalu thao nun lang namai jong kiphet’in.
Chuteng guhthima mu na-Pan nasan ding chu napeh ding ahi.
“Nget le twleh-in asuhmang theina guchan aphet vanga aguh mang theina leiset chungah gou khol hih-un;
amavang nget le twi-eh-in asuh mang thei louna, guchan jong aphet vanga aguh mang thei louna vanah nagou kholun;
ijeh-inem itile nagou umna a chu nalung jong um ding ahi.
“Mit hi natahsa meivah ahi; hijeh chun namit achima ahile nati pumpi vah ding ahi.
Amavang namit phata hih le chutile nati apumpia thim ding ahitai. Hijeh chun nasunga um vah chu athima ahile hiche thim chu nasatah ahi.

“Koima Pakai ni soh ahi theipoi; ijeh-inem itile aman khat hotbol’in tin khatjoh angailut ding ahi, ahiloule khat’ a hakaiyin tin khatjoh anahsahmo ding ahi. Nang ho Pathen le sum soh nahikop thei lou dingu ahi.

Hijeh a chu nangho jah a kasei ahi, ‘I kaneh ding hitam! I kadon ding hitam!’ tin nahinna dingun, ahiloule ‘I kasil’a kachen ding hitam,’ tin natahsa dingun lungkham hih-un. Anneh sanga hinkho chule nihchen ponsil sanga tahsa thupijo lou ham?
“Chunga leng vacha khu ngaitouvin, amahon tu la atu pouvin, at la a-at pouvin, changsal a la akhol sam pouvin, ahinla van a um na-Pauvin amaho khu avah nai.
Nang ho khute ho sanga lujo nahi louvu ham? Nang ho lah a lungkham hat’a ahinkho tong khat jopsao be thei koi nahiuvem?

Chule nihchen ponsil jeh a ibola nalungkham u ham? Jaova mol-hoipah khu iti khan ham ngaitouvin. Hiche ho khun tong la atong gim pouvin pat la akheh pouvin, ahivangin la keiman najah uva kaseipeh nahiuve,
Solomon jeng jong aloupina jousea akivon chun hiche mol-hoi khat toh kibangin akijemhoi pon ahi.
Chule jaova hampa tunia uma jinga lhum sunga kileh lut ta ding jeng bon Pathenin achutijep le vo tahsan lhom ho, chu sanga aman nangho najep hoi joh lou dingu ham?
Hijeh chun ‘I kaneh dingu ham! I kadon dingu ham! I kasil dingu ham!’ tin lungkham hih-un;
ijeh-inem itile chidang namdang ten hiti chu ahol’e; chule nanghon jong hicheng chu na ngaiyu van a na-Pauvin ahenai.
Ahivangin amasatah-in ama gam le chonphatna hol masauvin; chutengle hichengse jong chu nakipeh be dingu ahi.
Hijeh chun jinga dingin lungkham hihun, jing chun aman hin kingaito nan te. Ni khat hesohna chu nikhat’a dingin atoh bep’in ahi.
Oimoa naum louna dinguvin mi oimo hih-un. Na oimo bang cheh a chu oimoa naum dingu ahi;
chule nanghon nate bang banguva chu nangho kitepeh ding nahiuve.
Nangma mit’a inkam uma chu ngaito louva ibola nasopi mit’a boh them um chu navet ham?
Chule vetang, nangma mit’a inkam uma nasopi jah a, ‘Namit’a boh chu neilahdoh sah-in,’ tia iti nati thei ham?
Vo mipha lhem, nangma mit’a um inkam chu kilahdoh masah-in; chutengle nasopi mit’ a boh them chu lahdoh dinga namuchen ding bou ahi.
Uicha ho khu thil theng pe hih-un; vohcha anga natwikoh changu sep lha hih-un; amahon hiti ho chu akengun chon untin chule hung kile heiyun tin nangho san jong lheh tel’un nate.
“Thumun kipe ding nahiuve, hol’un namu dingu ahi; kiuvun kihonpeh ding nahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile athum chan achangin, ahol’an amun, chule akiuva chu kot kihonpeh ding ahi.
Achapan changlhah athum le song pea,
nga athum le gul pe dinga, nalah uva koi naum um?
Hijeh chun nangho bon migiloutah hiuva nachateu thilpha pehje nahet’uva ahile, hiche sanga chu gamchenga vana na-Pauvin ahenga thumte chu thilpha apeh lou ding ham?
Hijeh chun ima jousea min nangho iti nabol le nadeiyum, nanghon jong chutobang chun bolun; ijeh-inem itile hichu chondan thupeh le themgao ho thu ahi.
“Kot jima lut’un; ijeh-inem itile manna lam chu akot jatah ahin, alampi jong lentah ahi, chule chua lut chu tamtah ahi.
Hinna lam chu akot jong ajimin, alampi akichin, chule hichu amua alhome.
“Kelngoi von kivona asung lam la ngei hangtah hi themgao lhem nahenguva hungji ho chu kichih theiyun.
Amaho chu agauva nahet jeng dingu ahi. Mihemin lingphunga lengpiga aloa ahiloule meithai seltho linga theichang alo ngaiyem?
Hiche bang chun thingphung pha jouse aga aphan, thingphung phalou chu aga aphapon ahi.
Thingphung pha a aphalou gathei lou; thingphung phalouva jong apha gathei lou ahi.
Thingphung aga phalou chanse chu kiphuh lhua meiya kisep lutji ahi.
Hijeh chun nanghon amaho chu agauva nahet dingu ahi.
“Pakai, Pakai eiti chan chu van gama lut ding ahipoi; koi hileh van a um ka-Pa lunglam bolpa bou chu lut ding ahi.

Hi ni chule mi tamtah-in kajah a, ‘Pakai, Pakai, keihon nangma mina thu kasei louvu ham? Chule nangma mina thilha kanodoh louvu ham? Chule nangma mina bolmo kidang kabol louvu ham?’ tia asei dingu ahi.
Hiteng chule keiman amaho chu phongtah a kaseipeh a, ‘Keiman nangho ima tih chanin kahe khapouve; vo chonset bolte ho, kakoma konin chemang un,’ kati ding ahi.
“Hijeh chun koi hijongle kathu hicheng hi ja a bola chu song chunga in sa milung thim phatah toh kitekah ding ahi.
Chuin go ahung jun, twi ahungsoh-in, hui ahung nungin chuche ina chun achun ahi; ahin akhom song chunga kiphut ahijeh-in alhu tapon ahi.
Chule koi hijongle kathu hicheng hi ja a bollou chu nellei chunga in sa milung thim beitoh kitekah ding ahi.
Chuin go ahung jun, twi ahungsoh-in, hui ahung nungin, chuche in chu ahin nuh tan ahile alhutai; hin alhuh chu nasatah ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesun thu chucheng asei jouvin mihonpi chun athuhil chu kidang asa lheh-un ahi.
Hichu aman amaho danthu lekha sunho mihil banga hil louva thuneitah banga amaho chu thu ahil jeh ahi.
Chujouvin ama mol chunga konin akumsuh-in ahile mipi tamtah-in anung ajuiyun ahi.
Chuin vetau, miphah khat’in ahenga ahungin ama chibai ahung boh-in, “Pakai, nangman nalung ahile keima eingimsah thei nahi,” ahung tin ahi.
Chuin aman akhut alhangin atham-in, “Kalung ahi, ngimtan,” atin, chu-pettah chun aphah chu adamtai.
Chuin Jesun amapa jah a chun, “Ven, hiche thu hi koima jah a sei hih-in, amavang chen lang thempu gakimusah tan, chule amaho hettohsahna dingin Mose thupehsa thilto ding chu gatoh tan,” ati.
Ama Capernaum alut’in sepai jalam-kai khat’in ahenga ahungin,
“Pakai, kachapang khat langthin anan, anat athoh lel lheh jengin ina alume,” tin ahung ngeh tan ahi.
Chuin aman ajah a, “Hung ing ting hung damsah nange,” ati.
Chuin hiche sepai jalamkai chun adonbut’in, “Pakai, nangma ka-in sunga nahung lut ding chu, keima chutia kilom kahipoi; nangman thu chengcha khat seile chun kachapang chu dam jeng ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile keima jong mi thuneina noiya um kahin, keima noiya sepai ho aumun; chule keiman khatpen pen chu, ‘Chen,’ katile achen; achom khat, ‘Hungin,’ katile, ahungin; chule kasoh jah a, ‘Hiche bol’in,’ katile, abol jin ahi,” ati.
Jesun chuche thu ajah phat’in kidang asan anunga hung ho jah a chun, “Keiman tahbeh a nangho jah a kasei ahi, Israel lah jenga jong hitobang tahsan len khat cha jong kamu khapoi.
Chule keiman nangho jah a kasei ahi, niso lama kon le nilhum lama konin mi tamtah hungin tin Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob toh van gama toukhom ding ahiuve;
amavang gamsung chate polam muthim lah a kipaidoh ding ahiuve; hikoma chu ka le hagel um ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesun sepai jalamkai jah a chun, “Nangma chetan, natahsan bangin nachunga lhung hen,” ati. Chuphattah chun achapang chu adamtai.
Chujouvin Jesu Peter ina alut le anupanu natlhut veiya na analup amun;
chuin aman amanu khut agah thamin ahile anatlhut ahaitan, ahung thouvin ama jenlen apangtai.
Chuin nilhah-in mihon thilhavop mi tamtah ahenga ahin puiyun, aman thilha ho chu anodoh-in, chule ana jouse adamsah tai.
“Amatah-in ihatmo nau alan, inat jouseu apomang tai,” tia Isaiah themgaovin asei chu guilhun nadinga chuti ahitai.
Chujouvin Jesun akimvela mipi tamtah chu amun gal lang khat lama che ding asomin ahi.
Hiche pet chun danthu sun ho khat ahenga ahungin, “Houhil, nachena chanah juiyinge,” ati.
Jesun amapa jah a, “Sial hon ko aneiyun, chunga leng vachaten jong bu aneiyun, Mihem Chapa vangin alu ngapna mun aneipoi,” ati.
Chuin aseijui dang ho lah a khat’in ajah a, “Pakai amasan kachea kapa kaga vuina din thu neipen,” ati.
Jesun ama jah a, “Nangman kanung nung hinjui tan, mithihon amithiu kivui nauvinte,” ati.
Chujouvin ama konga atouvin asei-juite chun anung ajuiyun ahi.
Chuchun vetau, dillena chun khopihui hanunin anungin, twi akinongin kong chu akhu akhu jeng tan ahi; ahivangin ama aihmun ahi.
Chuin amaho acheuvin asukhang-un, “Pakai, neihuh hingun, athigam kahitauve,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman ajah uva,” Vo tahsan lhom ho, ibola kicha a nahiuvem?” ati. Chutah-in a ma athouvin hui le dillen chu aphoh-in ahile athip hel tai.
Chuin miho chun adatmo lheh jengun, “Ama hi iti mi hi nga na’ Hui le dillen sanin athu angaiye,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin ama agalkaiya Gadarenes gam alhunin thilhavop mi ni lhankhuh a konin amatoh kitoh dingin ahung lhonin ahi. Amani chu khoh tah ahilhonin hilam chu koimachan aho thei louhel ahi.
Hichun vetau, amani chu a-aojah lhonin, “Vo Pathen Chapa, Nang le keiho ipi ikimatnau um am? Ni kitep lhin masanga eibolgim dinga hunga nahim?” ati lhone.
Hipet chun amaho gal lampeh a chun vohcha hon khat alhan ahi.
Hichun thilha ho chun ama henga, “Keiho neikaidoh ule khuche vohcha hon lah a khun neisol’uvin,” tin anathum tauvin ahi.
Chuin, “Chetauvin,” a tin ahile, apotdoh-un vohcha ho sunga chun alut tauvin ahi; chuin vetau ahonchangpin halhaiyin alhaiyun kol’ah alhai lhauvin dillen’ah alha lut’un twiyah athigam tauvin ahi.
Chuin aching ho khosung lama ajamun thu umchan jouse le thilhavop mi teni thu chu agaseiyun ahi.
Chuin vetau, khosunga mi jouse Jesu toh kimuto dingin ahungdoh-un; chuin ama amu phat’un agamgi sunguva kona chedoh dingin ahenga atao tauvin ahi.
Chujouvin konga atouvin agalkaiyin ama khopiah aluttai.
Chuin veuvin, mihon alupna khun pumin langthi khat ahenga ahin pu’uvin ahi. Aman atahsanjeu chu amun, langthipa jah a chun, “Chapa, lung mongtah-in umin, nachonset ki ngaidam ahitai,” ati.
Hichun veuvin, danthu sun ho kim khat’in alungthim un “Hipa hin Pathen ataitome,“atiuvin ahi.
Hichun Jesun alung gel’u chu ahen, “Nanghon nalunguva ibola lung gilou navop’u ham?
‘Nachonsetna ho ki ngaidama ahitai’ ti le, ‘Thouvin lam jot’in,’ ti hoijoh tibaijo am?
Ahoi hita jongle Mihem Chapan leiset chunga mi chonset ngaidamna thahat aneiye, ti nahetna dingun” atin; hichun alangthipa jah a, “Thouvin, nalupna kilah-in lang na-ina chetan” ati.
Chuin amapa athouvin ain lama achetai.
Chuche amu phat’un mipi chu akicha tauvin ahi, chule hitobang thuneina mihemte pea Pathen chu avahchoi tauvin ahi.
Jesu chua konin achen ahile, kaidong, amin Matthew kiti, mi khat kaidonna muna atou amun ajah a, “Kanung hinjuiyin” atin ahile, ama akipatdoh-in anung ajuitai.
Chujouvin chuche ina an ne dingin atouvin ahile, veuvin, kaidong ho le mi chouse ho tamtah ahungun Jesu le aseijuite ho chutoh ankong aum khomun ahi.
Pharisee hon chuche amu’uvin aseijuite adongun, “Nahilpauvin ibola kaidongho le michonse ho toh an aneh khom ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Aman chuche ajan, “Atidamten louthem angai pouve, adamlouten bou angaiyui.

Nangho cheuvin, keiman kithoina ka-ngeh poi, kikhotona bou ka-ngeh-e, ti hi ipi kiseina ahi, gaki hilun; ijeh-inem itile keima mi chonphate kouva hung kahipoi, michonse te kouva hungjoh kahibouve, ati.
Chupettah chun John seijuite ahenga ahung ajah a, “Keiho le Pharisee hon la an ka-ngol mat chetjiuvin, nangma seijuiten an angolji hih-un, hiche hi ijeh ham?” atiuvin ahi.

Chuin Jesun amaho jah a, “Mou lang chun aloite aumpi lai sungsea aloite chu kingaise thei ngaiyu vem? Amavang mou lang chu akomuva kona akipui mang ni hunglhung ding ahi; chuteng chule an angol dingu ahi.
Koiman pon sopnem loulai hal’ in ponlui abeh ngaipoi, chutile abehna chun apon chu aloiset cheh joh ding ahi.

Chule mihemin lengpitwi thah savun peng luiya akhum ngaipoi, ichuti bol le apeng chu atumkeh jin atwi a long jal’in, apeng jong amang jin ahi; amavang lengpitwi thah chu apeng thah-a akikhum ngaiye, chutile bou anin akihuhbit jin ahi,” ati.

Hicheng thu chu asei pettah-in veuvin, vaipo khat ahungin ama chibai ahung boh-in, “Kachanu tutah chun a thin ahi; ahivangin nangma hungin lang ati hungtham le chun hing jeng ding ahi,” ahung tin ahi.
Chuin Jesu akipat’in anung ajuiyin aseijuiten jong ajuiyun;
chuin veuvin, kum som le kum ni athi longa na a numei khat’in anung lama ahungin alungthim in,
“Apon jeng cha hi thamkha jong leng kadam ding ahi,” atin; apon mongkai athamin ahi.
Chuin Jesu akiheiyin a manu chu amun, “Chanu, lung mong tah-in umin, natahsan in nadamsah ahitai,” ati. Chua pat chun amanu adam heltai.
Chujouvin Jesu vaipopa in ahung lut phat’in, sum kuli mut te ho le mipi poh veng vung chu amun, amaho jah a chun,
“Potdoh-un; ijeh inem itile chapangnu chu athi ahipoi, a-ihmu ahibouve,” a tin ahile, amahon anuisat tauvin ahi.
Ahivangin miho chu akaidoh-in in sunga alut’in chapangnu khut atuh-in ahile amanu athoutai.
Hichun hiche gamse sea chun hiche thu chu akithangsoh tai.
Chua konin Jesu achen ahile mitcho ni anung nunga ache lhonin. “Vo David chapa, neilungset’in” tin asam lhonin ahi.

Chuin ama insung alut phat’in hiche mitcho teni chu ahenga ahung lhonin, Jesun ajah lhonah, “Kei hin hichu boltheiyinte, ti naginchat lhon em?” tin adongin ahile, amanin, “Henge, Pakai,” ati lhonin ahi.
Chutah-in aman amit lhon chu akhoiyin, “Naginchat bang lhonin nachung lhonah chuta hen,” ati.
Hichun amit lhon ahah tai. Chuin Jesun amani chu hakham in akham in, “Ching thei lhonin, koima hetsah lhon hih-in,” ati.
Ahivangin amani apot lhonin chuche gamse sea chun ama min chu aphongjal lhontai.
Chuin acheuvin ahile, veuvin lampia thilhavop mi paomo khat ahengah ahin puiyun ahi.
Thilha chu adeldoh phat’in paomopa chu apaotai. Hichun mipi chun kidang asauvin, “Israel lah a hitobang akimukha hih-e,” atiuvin ahi.
Pharisee ho vangin, “Thilha ho lengpa mina thilha ho adeldoh hichu,” atiuve.
Chujouvin Jesu khotin le veng tin’ah avah le avah len akikhop nau in tin’ah thu ahil len, gamsung Kipana Thupha ahil lhanglen hivei namkim le nat namkim adamsah tan ahi.
Miho chu achingbei kelngoi honcha banga agentheiyuva acheh chao jeh-u chun alung ase lheh-in ahi.
Chuphat’in aseijuite jah a, “Chang-at ding atam lheh-in ahivangin natonga alhome.
Hijeh chun achang atna a dinga natong ho ahinsol dohna dingin chang neipu henga taovun” ati.
Chuin aman aseijuite som le ni chu akoma akouvin lhagao boh nomang dingle hivei namkim le nat namkim damsah dingin amaho chu thuneina apen ahi.
Hicheng solchah som le niho chu aminu hiche hi ahi: Amasan Peter kiti Simon le anaopa Andrew. Zebedee chapa Jacob le anaopa John.
Philip le Bartholomew. Thomas le kaidong Matthew. Alphaeus chapa Jacob le Thaddaeus,
chule Canaan mi Simon le ama matsah a pang lscariot Judas jong chu ahi.
Hicheng som le ni chu thu apen asol’in, “Chidang namdang koima lampi jot hih-un, chule Samaria khopi sung khat cha a jong lut hih-un;
amavang chu sangin, Israel insung mi amangsa kelngoi henga cheuvin.
Chule nache pumun, ‘Van gam anaitai,’ tin hil lhang leuvin.
Anaho damsah-un lang, athi thouvun, aphah ho suthengun lang thilha nodohun; manbeiya nasanu ahin manbeiyin homun.
Nanghon nadangka dip sunguva sana, dangka, sumsan,
chule najin nauva dingin sakhao ahiloule sangkhol tho ni, kengchot, tenggol hiti chu kiken hih-un; ijeh-inem itile natongan aneh ding amua lom ahi.
Chule nache nauva khopi sung hi le khote sung hi le nalut tengu le lhunna kilom koi umam, phatechan ngaitouvin, chule chua kona napotdoh kahseuvin hikoma chun umun.
Chule in khat’a nalut tengu le hiche in chu phatthei boh-un.
Chule hiche in chu phatthei changhoi ahile, nalungmon nau chu achungah um hen; achanghoi ahilou vang le hiche lungmonna chu nahenguva hung kile kitta hen.
Chule koi hile nalhunsah lou le nathu seiyu ngai lou chu, chuche ina kon le chuche khoa kona napotdoh tengu le nakengphang uva leivui sanin thing lhauvin.
Keiman nangho jah a tahbeh a kasei ahi, thupi kitan ni le chuche kho umchan sanga chu Sodom le Gomorrah gam umchan thoh baijo ding ahi.
Veuvin, keiman nangho ngeihon lah a kelngoi banga kasol nahiuve; hijeh chun nangho gul bangin lungthim them-un, vakhu bangin tohset khoiset nei louvin khan phauvin.
Ahivangin mihem lamah kichih theiyun; ijeh-inem itile amahon nangho thutan vaihom kikhopnaa pedoh-un natin, chule akikhop nau ina navoh dingu ahi.
Chule gam vaipote le lengte ho ang a amaho le chidang namdangte hetsahna dinga keima jal’a hung kikai ding nahiuve.
Ahivangin min napeh doh tengu le ipi nasei dingu lungkham hih-un; sei ding chan apettah le nakipe dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile thuseiya chu nangho hilouvin na-Pau Lhagaovin nalung sunguva asei ahibouve.
Chule asopin asopi, pan acha tha dinga ahinpeh doh ding; chate kipana anu le apa adouva amaho chu ahin thasah ding ahi.
Chule keima min jal’a nangho mi jouse hot’a nahung um dingu ahi; ahin akhon ni geiya thoh lhom keiya pangdet pa bou chu huhhinga um ding ahi.
Hiche khoa min nabolset tengu le kho dangah jam lut’un, ijeh-inem itile tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, Mihem Chapa ahungma Israelte kho jouse nachotsoh lou dingu ahi.
Ahilpa sangin aseijui achung nungjo poi, apakai sangin jong asoh achung nungjo poi.
Aseijui chu ahilpa toh chule asoh apakaipa toh akikot le aphaset ahi. Amahon ainneipupen bon Beelzebul atiule a-insung mite chu iti atida dingu ham!
Hijeh chun nanghon amaho chu kicha hih-un; ijeh-inem itile akiphongdoh lou ding akisela imacha aumpoi, chule hetdoh lou ding imacha akiima aumpoi.
Keiman nangho jah a muthima kasei chu nanghon khovah a seiyun; na nauva najah-u chu in chunga sap thouvin.
Chule natahsau that’a lhagao that thei lou ho chu kicha hih-un, lhagao le tahsa kop’a damuna sumang thei amabou chu kichauvin.
Vasah ni paisa khat man a kilhaji lou ham? Achuti vangin na-Pau thu louvin hitiho chu khatcha jong tola lha lou ding ahi.
Nalu chunguva nasam jang jouseu san a kisim soh keiya ahi.
Hijeh chun kicha hih-un; vasah tamtah sanga nangho lujo nahiuve.
Hijeh chun koi hile miho ang a kei eiseidoh chan chu keiman jong van a ka-Pa ang a kaseidoh ding ahi.
Amavang koi hile miho ang a keima eiseileppa vang chu keiman jong van a ka-Pa ang a kaseilep ding ahi.
Lei chunga chamna lhah dinga hungin nei ngaito hih-un; chamna hilou-vin chemjam hem lhah joh a hung kahi-bouve.
Ijeh-inem itile mi achapan apa, achanun anu, amounun atehpi, dousah dingjoh a hung kahibouve;
chule mi chu amelma ama insung mitetah hiding ahi.
Koi hile keima sanga anu apa ngailujoa chu keiya hoi ahipoi; chule koi hile keima sanga achanu le achapa ngailujoa chu keiya hoi ahipoi.
Chule koi hijongle athingpel kiputlea kanung hinjui lou jong chu keiya hoi ahipoi.
Koi hile ahinna mua chun achan ding ahi; chule keima jala ahinna chanpa chun amu ding ahi.
Koi hile nangho lhunsah a chun keima eilhunsah ahi; chule koi hile keima eilhunsah a chun eisolpa alhunsah ahi.
Themgao min a themgao lhunsah a chun themgao kipaman asan ding ahi. Chule michonpha tia michonpha lhunsah a chun michonpha kipaman asan ding ahi.
Koi hile hiche neocha ho lah a hi seijui ahi, tia twi dap khon khat jengcha don ding pechan chun tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, itinama jong le kipaman asan ding achan lou ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun Jesun aseijui som le ni ho chu thu apeh jouvin chukom muna kon chun achondoh-in akhotin’uva thu hil le ding le hil lhang le dingin achetan ahi.
Chuin Johnin songkul’ah Christa thilbol umchan thu ajan ahile, aseijuite phabep apalaisah-in. “Ahung dinga chu nangma nahimong hinam?
Ole achom dang khat ka-nga dingu ham?” agatisah-in ahi.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Nangho cheuvin lang nathujah chengseu le nathilmu cheng-seu hi athuchan John jah a gasei tauvin;
mitchon kho amutai; eilbaiyin lam ajot-tai, miphah suhthengin aumin, chule nangongan kho ajatan, mi thisa kaithou-vin aumtai, chule mivaichate Kipana Thu-pha akiseipeh tai.
Chule koi hijongle keiya kipal lhuhna kom nei lou chu anun nom ahi,” ati.
Chuin hite ho chu ache nunguvin aman mipi jah a chun John thudol asei panin, “Ipi ve dinga gamthip’a chu nachedoh uham? Huiyin peng amut ling ham?
Achutile ipi ve dinga ba chedoh nahiuvem? Pon nem kisil mi ham? Veuvin, pon nem sil ho khu leng ina um ahiuve.
Ibola ba nachedoh uham? Themgao ve dinga ong? Ahi, kaseipeh nahiuve, themgao sanga chung nungjo ahi.
‘Ven keiman kasottol namasang sangah kasol’ e; aman namasang sanga nalampi asem ding ahi,’ tia kisun chu ama hi ahi.
Najah uva tahbeh a kasei ahi, numei sunga peng lah a John Baptist sanga lenjo koima asohdoh khapoi, ahivangin van gama aneojo chu ama sanga lenjo ahi.
Chule John Baptist nikhoa pat tugeiya hi van gam chu pumhat’a lah ahi, chule ahatten pumhat’in alauvin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile John geiya themgao jouse le dan thubun hiche thusoh ding hi aseiyuva aphondoh sau ahitai.
Chule nanghon hiche thu hi nalah nomu le ahung dinga kisei Elijah amatah chu ahi.
Angaina ding na neiyan ngai hen.
Tu khanga mite hi koi toh katekah ta dem? Chapang hon kaithel tola touva aloiho kouva ajah uva, ‘Kuli kamutpeh ule nalam hih-un;
kakau le la na om nabeng pouve,’ tia chapang ho tobang nahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile John ahungin ne lou don lou ahin, hichun mihon, Thilhavop ahi,’ atiuvin ahi.
Mihem Chapa ahungin anen adonin ahile, ‘Veuvin, neh hat le julop ahi, kaidong hole mi chonse ho jolle gol ahi,’ atiuve. Ahinla chihna chu anatoh hon them achan nan ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in thilbol kidang ahabol dehna kho ho chun alung ahei lou jeh-u chun aphohsal pan tan ahi.

“Ohe, Chorazin, nada ahi! Ohe Bethsaida nada ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nalah uva thilbol thahatna kidang kibol chengse chu Tyre le Sidon khopia kibol hile, sotpia pat chun achenghon khaopon kisil’un tin vut kinu’ uvin tin alungu heitauvinte.
Ahinla keiman kaseipeh nahiuve, thupi tan ni le nangho thoh ding sanga Tyre le Sidon thoh ding oljo ding ahi.

Chule vo Capernaum, nang van geiya choisanga naum ding ham? Thikhol khul’a kumlha ding nahijo bouve; ijeh-inem itile nalah uva thil kidang kibol chengse hi Sodom khoa kibol hileh tugei hin umna laiyunte.
Chujongle tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, thupi tan ni le nangho thoh ding sanga Sodom thoh ding oljo ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche pet chun Jesu apaovin, “Vo ka-Pa, van le lei Pakai, nangman michingte le lungthim them ho hengah hicheng thu hi na-ima naocha ho henga naphondoh jeh hin nangma kathangvah-e;
ahi, Pa, hiti chu nangma lung lhaina lam ahi.
Imajouse ka-Pan keima eipehdohsoh ahitai; chule Pa tailou chun Chapa chu koimachan ahepoi; chule Chapa tailou le aman aphondoh nomna pa tailou chun koimachan Pa chu ahepoi.
Tonggimte le pohgihte, kahenga hungun; keiman nangho cholngah sah unge.
Keima lung nengtah le nun nem tah kahi; hijeh chun kanamkoljon lauvin lang kibu’uvin, keima a konin kihil’un; chutile nalunguva olna namu dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile kanamkoljon nomtah ahin, kapoh jong jangtah ahi,” ati.
Hiche lai chun cholngah nin Jesun bu lei lai ajot’in aseijuite agil keltauvin ahile, changvui asih-un ane pantauvin ahi.
Ahin Pharisee hon hichu amu’uvin ama jah a, “Vetan, cholngah nia bol ngai lou naseijuiten abol’ui,” atiuve.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “David’in aloite toh agil kel’uva abol chu nasim khah louvu ham?
Pathen houina alut’a aman jong aloiten jong thempu tailouvin neh ngai lou vetsahna changlhah to aneh jengu chu?
Ahiloule houina um thempu hon cholngah ni nit louva aum jongun themmo achang pouvin ahi, hichu dan thubua nasimdoh khah louvu ham?
Ahin nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, hikoma hin houin sanga chungnungjo khat aume.
Chule ‘keiman gan a lhai ka-ngeh poi, lungsetna bou ka-ngeh-e,’ tia kisei hi ipi ahi nanahetaleu chun themmona nei lou ho chu nanathem mosah lou dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile Mihem Chapa chu cholngah ni Pakai ahi,” ati.
Chuin chua konin achedoh-in akikhop nau inah alut ‘in, chuin veuvin, hia chun mi akhut ngoi khat aumin ahi.
Chuin ahehset theina dingun, “Chol-ngah nia hi boldam dan ngai hi na hilou ham?” tin Jesu adongun ahi.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Nalah uva khattouvin kelngoi khat neihen lang hichu cholngah nin kokhuh a lhalut ta leh gaman a galoidoh lou ding koi naumuvem?
Chuti chu ahile kelngoi sanga mihem iti lutjoh tam! Hiche jeh chun cholngah nia thilpha bolngai ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in mipa jah a chun, “Nakhut lhangin,” ati.
Mipa chun akhut alhangin ahile alang khat bangin adamheltai. Ahin Pharisee ho apotdoh-un ama suhmangna thei ngaiton akihou khomtauvin ahi.
Ahivangin Jesun hichu ahen chu-koma kon chun achemangtai. Chuin mi tamtah-in anung ajuiyin, aman abon-chauvin aboldam soh keiyin;
chule ama aphondoh louna dinguvin amaho chu akhamin ahi.
Isaiah themgaovin asei:
“Veuvin, kasottol kalhentum kadeitah hi, Achunga kalung alhai ta ngeiye; Achunga ka-Lhagao kakoi ding ahi, Chule aman chidang namdangte henga Dan dih tah a thutan aphondoh ding ahi;
Aman mi anel lou ding ahi; o sanga thu asei lou ding ahi, Khosung lamlena koiman a-o ja louhel ding ahi;
Ajo soh keiya dandih a thutan achonsah Masangsea pumpeng kihehchip kihehbong pai lou ding ahi. Chule thaomei pat khua jong athamit lou dingahi.
Chule ama min chu Chidang namdangten kinepnaa anei dingu ahi, ati chu gui lhunna dinga chuti ahi,” ati.
Hichepet chun thilhavop paomo mitcho khat ahenga ahinpuiyun; aman aboldamin ahile, apaomopa chu apao theiyin kho jong amutai.
Chuin mipi chengse chun kidang asa lheh un, “Ama hi David chapa hilou ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Ahin Pharisee ho chun hichu ajah-un, “Thilha ho lengpa Beelzebul toh kitho louvin hichepan thilha anodohpoi,” atiu-vin ahi.

Chuin aman alungpoh-u chu ahen ajah uva, “Gamsung khat ama le ama kidoutoa kichomkhen chan jong chu amangthah jin, chule khopi sung khat hijongle insung khat hijongle ki-doutoa kichomkhen chan jong chu ding-doh lou ding ahi.
Chule Satanin Satan anodoh a ahile a ma le a ma kidou ahi; achutile agam iti dindoh ding ham?
Chujongle keiman Beelzebul vanga thi-lha ho kanodoh ahile, nachateuvin koi vanga anodoh jiu hintem? Hijeh a chu amaho cheng chu nangho thutan a pang ding ahiuve.
Ahin keima Pathen Lhagao vanga thilha ho nodoh jia kahi vang le Pathen gam chu nahengu hung lhunga ahitai.
Chuti ahilou le kon mihat chu kan masa louva a-ina lut’a iti achom thei ngaiyem? Kan masah a chuteng le chom ding bou ahi.
Koi hile keima lama pang lou chu eidouva ahi; chule eikhop khompi lou chu athecheh ahi.
Hijeh chun kaseipeh nahiuve, mihemte achonsetnau le Pathen ataitom nau ito-bang hijongle ki ngaidam ding ahin, Lhagao Theng taitoma vang ki-ngaidam lou ding ahi.
Chule koi hijongle Mihem Chapa douna a thuseiya chu ki ngaidam ding ahi; Lhagao Theng douna a thuseiya vang chu tu hinlaiyin jong khonunga hinkho hung lhung dinga jong ngaidam amu lou ding ahi.
Thing chu aphai natiu le aga jong aphai, ti ngal’un, thing aphapoi natiu le aga jong aphapoi tiuvin; ijeh-inem itile thing chu agan akihei.
Vo gulse son ho, nanghon nagitlou pumpiuva thupha iti nasei thei dingu ham? Ijeh-inem itile lung sunga alet’a kona kamin asei-dohji ahi.
Miphan thilpha boma konin thilpha asodoh-in, chule misen thilse boma konin thilse asodoh jin ahi.
Ahin kaseipeh nahiuve, mihem in man lou ding thu asei chanse hi thupi kitan ni le hicheng chu asuhto cheh dingu ahi.
Nangma nathun them nachansah ding ahin, chule nathuma man themmo nachansah ding ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in danthu sun ho le Pha-risee ho phabep khat’in adonbut’un, “Houhil, nanga konin melchihna kamu nomuve” atiuvin ahi.
Ahin a man adon-hut’in ajah uva, “Migilou le mijong khanga miten melchihna ahol’ui, ahinla Jonah themgao melchihna tailou adang kipe lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile, Jonah nithum jan thum nga len gil sunga aumin, hibanga chu Mihem Chapa jong lei gila nithum jan thum um ding ahi.

Nineveh khopia miho chun thupi kitan-na a tulai khang mite toh hung ding khoma tulai khang hi themmo ahinchan dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon Jonah thuhil chun a lung aheiyun ahi; ahin veuvin, Jonah sanga chungnungjo hikoma aume.

Lhang gam lengnun thupi tanna a hiche tulai khang mitetoh hung thoudoh khoma amaho hi themmo ahinchan ding ahi, ijeh-inem itile aman kolmonga konin Solomon chih thu ngai dingin ahungin ahi; ahin veuvin, Solomon sanga chung-nungjo hikoma aume.
Lhagaoboh chu mi sunga kona apotdoh teng le twi beina muntin’ah avah le avah len cholngahna ahol’in mu la amujipoi.
Chuteng le aman, ‘Kahung potdohna ka-inma maa chun che kit tange,’ atin; ahung le agoh a akitheh ngim le akijep hoi chu amun,

chutengle achen ama sanga giloujo lhagao dang sagi agapuiyin; chule amaho chua chun alut’un achengji tauve, chule mipa um-chan chu amasa sangin anunga akhohjo cheh jitan ahi. Tulai khang migiloute chunga jong hi chutobang ding ahi,” ati.
Aman mipi lah a thu asei nalaiyin, hi pettah chun veuvin, anu le asopiten ama hou nomin ahol’un inpoah adingun ahi.
Chuin mi khat’in ajah a, “Ven, nanu le nasopite nangma hou nomin nahol’un inpoah a ading jinguve,” ati.
Ahin aman achuti seipa chu adonbut’in, “Kanu koi ham? Koiham kasopi?” ati.
Chuin aseijuite chu akhut ajah khumin, “Veuvin, hite ho hi kanu le kasopite ahiuve!
Ijeh-inem itile van a um ka-Pa lung lama chonpatah chu kasopipa le kasopinu chule kanu ahi,” ati.
Hiche ni chun Jesu ina konin apotdoh-in dil pangah atouvin ahi.
Chuin ahengah mipi tamtah ahung khom un hijeh chun ama kong khat’ah alut’in atoutai; chule mipi chengse chu vaokam-ah adingun ahi.
Chuin amaho chu thulemin thu tam tah ahil’in, “Ngaiyun, muchi thepa khat muchi then achen,
athe theleh muchi chu abang lamsih a achun ahile, vachaten ahung loh gam-tauve.
Abang songlheo chung leipatna ah achun ahin, alei asa lou jeh-in akehdoh pai jengin;
ahivangin nisa a hung soh-in ahile asang gon; jung anei lou jeh-in agop tan ahi.
Abang ling lah a achun, aling chu ahung khangin adep mangtai.
Adang ho vang lei pha laijah achun a bang ajat ja khat, a bang ajat som gup, abang ajat som thumin agan ahi.
Angaina ding na neiyan ngai hen,” ati.
Chuin aseijuite ahenga ahungun ajah a, “Ibola amaho jah a chu thulema nasei ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Jesun adonbut’in “Nangho vang van gam thuguh chu nahet dinguva kipea nahiuve; ahin amaho hi kipe lou ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile koi hijong le aneiya chu kipeh ben tin anei letset ding ahi, anei louva chu aneichasun jong chu amaa kona kilahpeh ding ahi.
Hiche jeh a hi ajah uva thulema kasei ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon amu vangun amu hih-un, ana ajah vangun aja hih-un, angainaje jong ahepouve.
Chule Isaiah themgaovin khonunga thusoh ding asei : “Nanghon ja vang ja nauvin natin, Angainaje nahet lou dingu; Mu vang mu nauvin natin Nahetdoh lou dingu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile hiche nam mite hin Amit’uva amu louva, anauva aiah louva Alunga jong ahetdoh louva Chule ahung kihei kit louva Keiman amaho chu kadamsah louna dingin Alungu thaovin atomin, Chule akolseh gamun, Chule amit asingui,’ ati chu achunguva guilhunga ahi.
Nangho mit vang amu jeh-u chun mit nun nom ahi, nanau jong ajah jeh-u chun na nun nom ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, themgao tamtah le michonpha tamtah-in nangho thilmu hi mu atup lheh jiuvin, ahivangin amupouvin ahi, chule nathu jah chengseu hi jah atup’un, ahinla ajapouvin ahi.
Hichejeh chun muchi thepa thulem chu ngaiyun.
Koi hile gamsung thu ajah teng a angainaje helou chu hiche pettah chun agilou chu ahungin, alung sunga kithesa chengse chu alah mang peh jitan ahi. Hichepa chu akithe lamsih a chua chu ahi.
Akithea songlheo chunga leipatna chua chu thu ajah jah a thanom tah a jop pai jenga chu ahi;
ahivangin alung sunga ajung anei lou jeh-in ni chom khat aumji bouve; chule thu jeh a genthei hesohna bolsetna aum phat le alhupai jitai.
Chule akithea linglah a chua chu athu ajan ahile leiset hinkho lungkhamna le lhep lhahna dimset haona lungthimin adep lih jin ga louvin aumjitai.
Chule akithea leipha laiya chua vang chu, thu ajah a angainaje hea chu ahi; ama chu aga tahbeh-in, chule abang ajat ja, abang ajat somgup, abang ajat som thumin aga apung jin ahi,” ati.
Aman amaho jah a chun thulem chomkhat asei kit’in, “Van gam chu mi khat aloulaiya muchipha thea toh kitekah ahi.
Ahin miho ihmut lanin amelma chu ahungin achang lah a chun changlhem athepeh-in achemangtan ahi.
Chuin chang kung chu ahung khangtouvin avui adoh-in ahile, chuphat ‘in changlhem jong chu akilahdoh-in ahi.
Chuin aneipa sohte ahenga ahungun ajah a, “Hepu, nalouva khu muchi pha nathe lou ham? Ahile hoilam kona changlhem keh ham?” atiuve.
Aman ajah uva, “Melma khattou bol hiya chu,” ati. Chuin amahon ajah a, “Achutile cheuving lang changlhem chengse gachom khomleu vang nalung ham?” atiuve.
Aman adonbut’in, “Ahipoi, chutile changlhem nabodoh khomna lamuvah chang jong bodoh tha get’un nate.

A-at phat kahsen khan tha nante, chang at teng le keiman chang at ding ho jah a, ‘Changlhem chu govam dingin khomun lang kankhom un, chang vang chu kachang pangah koi lut tauvin,’ ti nange, ati tin,” aseiye.
Thulem dang khat ajah uva asei kit’in, “Van gam chu mi khat’in alah a alouva athe ankam mu tobang ahi.
Hichu muchi dang dang sangin aneopenin, ahivangin akedoh a akhandoh phat’in hamdang sangin aphunglenjon thing asoh tan, chuti chun chunga leng vachaho abah lah a ahung gehjitai,” ati.
Amaho jah a thulem khatma asei kit’in, “Van gam chu numei khat’in alah a changbong dan thum lah a avuiya aboncha apomsoh kahsea abil chol tobang ahi,” ati.
Jesun mipi jah a hichengse chu abonchan thulemin aseiyin; chule thulem louvin ajah uva imacha aseipon ahi.
Themgao thusei: “Keiman thulem sei nan kakam kang ting, Leiset kisemtil’a pat’a thuguh chengse kaphondoh ding ahi,” ati. chu guilhunna dinga chuti ahi.
Chujouvin aman mipi chu adalhan in sungah alut’in ahile, aseijuite ahengah ahungun, “Loulaiya changlhem ke thulem chu neihil chenun,” ahung tiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman adonbut’in, “Muchi pha thea chu Mihem Chapa ahi;
lou chu vannoi leiset ahi; muchi pha chu gamsung chate ahiuve; chang lhem chu migiloupa chate ahiuve;
melmah a thea chu diabol ahi; changkhop phat chu vannoi leiset kichai ni ahin, chang-at te ho chu Vantil te ahiuve.
Hijeh a chu changlhem chengse achop khomuva meiya ago banguva chu vannoi leiset kichai ni jong le chuti ding ahi.
Mihem Chapan Avantil te sol’in tin chule amahon gamsunga konin kisuhmona chengse le akhang giloute jouse chomkhom un tin,
lhum sunga aselut dingu ahi; hikoma chu ka le hagel um ding ahi.
Chutengle michonphate chengse a-Pau gama nisa banga vah ding ahiuve. Na nei neiyan ngai hen.
“Van gam chu loulaiya kiselgu thil lu tobang ahi; hichu mi khattouvin amudoh-in aselgun; chule kipah tah-in achen anei jouse ajoh-in, hiche lou chu achon ahi.
“Chule van gam chu sumkolvei mi twikohchang phatah holatoh abange.
Ama chun twikohchang man tamtah khat amun, chuin achen anei jouse ajohin hichu achon ahi.
“Chule Van gam chu len khat twikhanglen a kisep nga tin nga tang huikhoma tobang ahi.
Hiche len chu adim phat’in mihon vaokam ah akaidoh un, hikoma chun atouvun apha cha cha alheng khom un bom ah akhum un, aphalou chengse apaitauve.
Hiche banga chu vannoi leiset kichai ni jong le chuti ding ahi; Vantil te hungun tin michonpha lah a konin michonse lakhen untin, amaho chu lhum sunga aselut dingu ahi.
Hikoma chu ka le hagel um ding ahi.
Hicheng chu angaije nahettah uvem,” tin adongin ahile, amahon ajah a, “Henge,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Chuti ahijeh chun danthu sun, van gam seijui chengse chu athil lui lah a kona thil athah le alui sodoh a inneipu khat tobang ahiuve,” ati.
Jesun thulem hicheng chu asei jouvin chukoma kon chun akipatdoh tai.
Chuin ama gam lamah ahungin miho chu akikhop nau in’ah ahiltan ahi; chuti chun amahon kidang asa lheh jengun, “Hichepa chihna le thil kidang boltheina hi hoiya kon hi nga na?
Ama hi thing thembol chapa hilou ham? Anu min Mariam, chule anaote min Jacob, Joseph, Simon chule Judah hilou ham?
Chule asopinute jong hikoma ilah uva cheng hilou ham? Achutile hichengpi hi hoiya akilah ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Chuti chun achungah alung hitapouvin ahi. Hijeh chun Jesun ajah uva, “Themgao chu ama gamsung le ama insung tailouvah jabol louvin aum ngaipoi,” ati.
Atahsan lou jeh-u chun aman chukoma chun thil kidang atam boltapon ahi.
Hiche lai tah chun Herod lengpan Jesu thu kithan chu ajan ajenle ho jah a,
“Hiche hi John Baptist ahi; ama thia kona thoudoh kit ahitai; chuche jeh a chu chuti thil kidang boltheina chu ama a uma abol ahi,” ati.
Ijeh-inem itile Herod chun anaopa Philip ji Herodias jal a hiche masanga chu John amat’a akana songkul’a akhum ahi.
Hichu ajah a John in, “Amanu chu jia nanei dan ngai ahipoi,” atijeh ahi.
Hiche chun lengpan ama chu tha dinga agot vangin mihon John chu themgao ahi, tia angaito jeh-un miho chu akichan ahi.
Ahivangin Herod aso nikho alhin nin Herodias chanu jalah a ahung lamin Herod chu alung lhaisah tan ahi.
Hichun amanu chu ipi hijong le athum chan pe dingin akihahsel leuvin ateptan ahi.
Chuin amanu chu anun athumop’in ajah a, “John Baptist luchang kong khat’in hilaiya hin neipen,’ tin,” ati.
Chuphat’in lengpa alung dongtan ahi; ahivangin akihahselna le aankong umpi ho jal’in peh ding thu apetai.
Chuin mi asol’in songkul sunga John luchang agatanden sah tan ahi.
Chuin kong khat’in ahindomin alu chu nu-ngah nu chu apen ahile, amanun achoiyin anu agapetai.
Chuphat’in aseijuiten acheuvin along chu agapu’uvin avuitauve. Chuin ahungun thusoh chu Jesu henga ahung seiyun ahi.
Jesun chuche ajah phat chun chukoma kon chun apot’in kongin akitol’in gamthip’a achoma achetai. Ahin mihon hichu aheuvin khopi chengsea konin akengin acheuvin anung ajuitauve.
Chuin ama vaokama ahung potdoh le mipi tamtah amun amaho chu alung asen adamlou ho chu aboldamtai.
Chujouvin nilhah ahi phat’in aseijuite ahenga ahungun ajah a, “Hiche komla gamthip ahin, nilhah jongla ahitan, miho hi akho akhoa chea aneh dingu gakichoh dingin sol mangtan,” atiuve.
Jesun la ajah uva, “Che lou leu akhoh poi; nanghon neh ding peuvin,” ati.
Chuin amahon ajah a, “Hikoma changlhah pheng nga le nga ni seh bou kaneiyuve,” atiuvin ahi.
Aman, “Hikoma kahenga hinchoiyun,” ati.

Chuin miho chu hampa chunga tou dingin asol’in, changlhah pheng nga le nga ni chu alan van lam aven phatthei aboh-in, chuin changlhah chu aheh bal bal’in aseijuite khut’a a pen; aseijuiten mipi chu a hop peh-un ahi.
Chuin abonchauvin aneuvin ava soh keiyun; aneh moh-u anong chengse chu paipeh som le paipeh ni aloh dimun ahi.
Anea chu numei le chapang sim louvin mi sang nga jen ahiuve.
Chuin aman mipi chengse chu alhah doh lai sungsen gal lang khat lama anagalkai masa dingin aseijuite konga alutsah-in asol paitan ahi.
Chuin mipi chu alhah doh jouvin atao dingin mol a chun achomin akal touvin ahi. Jan ahi phat’in ama hikoma chun achangseh in a um in ahi.
Hichepet chun kong chu dillen lailungah aumin hui ale lama anun jeh-in twi kinon gin kong chu aleh le jengin ahi.
Chuin khovah konin aman twi chunga lam ahin jot’in aheng lamuva ahungin ahi.
Aman chutia twi chunga lam ajot chu aseijuiten amu’uvin, ‘Joumi ahi,’ tin atijauvin akichauvin a-aosot tauvin ahi.
Ahin Jesun ahin houpaiyin, ajah uva, “Lung mong tah-in umun, keima kahi, kicha hih-un,” ati.
Chuin Peter in adonbut’in, “Pakai, nang nahile twi chunga nahenga kahungna dingin thu neipen,” ati.
Chuin aman, “Hung tangem,” atin ahile, Peter konga konin akumlhan twi chunga lam ajot’in Jesu hengah achetai.
Ahinla huinun chu amun ahile akichatan, chuin lhalut ding akigotan ahile “Pakai, neihuhhing in,” tin asamtan ahi.
Chuin Jesun akhut alhan aman paiyin, “Vo tahsan lhom, ibola natahsan lel ham?” ati.
Chu-jouvin konga akal phat lhonin hui athip jeng tan ahi.
Chuin konga um ho chun, “Pathen chapa tah mong nahi,” atiuvin, chibai aboh tauvin ahi.
Chuin agalkaiyun Gennesaret gamsung alhung tauvin ahi.
Chuin chuche gam miho chun ahetdoh phat’un agam kimvel’uva mi asol’un adamlou jouse ahengah ahin puiyun;
apon mongkai beh atham dingu chun ahenga ataovun, atham kha chan chu adamhel hel’un ahi.
Hichepet tah chun Jerusalema konin Pharisee ho le danthu sun ho phabep ahungun,
Jesu jah a, “Ibola nasei juiten upate akhang akhanga ahung chonna dan apal lhah uva khut sil louva an anehjiu ham?” atiuve.
Chuin aman aledoh-in, “Nanghon jong ibola nangho chonna dan jal’a Pathen thupeh napal lhah-u ham?
Ijeh-inem itile Pathen in ‘Nanu napau jabol’un, chule anu le apa housea chu thihel hen,’ ati ahi.
Nanghon la, ‘Koi hileh anu le apa jah a “Kavanga naphatchomna dingu jouse chu Pathen kipea ahi,” ti chan chu apa ajabol lou ding ahi,’ natiuve.
Chuti chun nangho chonna thu jal’in Pathen thupeh nathai mil’un ahi.
Mipha lhem ho, Isaiah-in nangho khanchan ding thu aseiya:
‘Hiche phung mite hin akamuvin eijabol un, Alungu la keiya konin gam latah ahi;
Amahon athu hil nauva mihem thupeh jeng thua ahil jeh uvin Eihouvu jong moh ahi,’ ati chu adih tangeiye,” ati.
Chuin Jesun mihonpi chu ahenga akouvin “Ngai phauvin lang hetoh-un;
mi kam sunga lut chun ama chu a-suboh poi; mi kamsunga kona hung potbou chun asuboh-e,” ati.
Chutah-in aseijuite ahengah ahungun ajah a, “Pharisee hon chuche thu ajah uva alung hilouvu khu nahet em?” atiuve.
Chuin aman adonbut’in, “Van a um ka-Pa phu hilouva keh chengse chu kibotdoh ding ahi.
Hite ho khu limsah hih-un, amaho khu mitcho lamhil ahiuve. Mitchon mitcho lamkaile ani lhona kokhuh a lhalut ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin Peterin adonbut’in ajah a, “Hiche thulem thu hi neihil chenun,” ati.
Aman, “Nangho jong tu geiya hetna nei louva naum nah laiyu ham?
Kam sunga lut chu oisunga alhalut’in poso na’ah apotpai-jitai, hichu he loulai nahiu vem?
Kam sunga kona hung pot vang chu lung sunga kona hung pot ahin; hiche tah bou chun mi asuboh-in ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile lung sunga konin lung gilou, toltha na, miji toh jon, jon than hoi, guchat, thujousei, taitomna hicheng chu apotjin ahi.
Hicheng ho chun mi asuboh-in ahi; khut sil louva an neh vangin mi asubohpoi,” ati.
Chuin Jesu chukoma konin apotdoh in Tyre le Sidon gamkol lamah achetai.
Chuin veuvin, chuche gamkaiya cheng Canaan mi numei khat ahengah ahungin, “Pakai, David chapa, neilung-set’in; kachanu thilhan phalou tah-in aman’e,” tin ahinsam in ahi.
Amanla kam khatchan jong adonbutpoi. Chuin aseijuite ahengah ahungun ajah a, “Ama-nu hi solmangtan, ijeh-inem itile kanung sang chenguvah asam asamin ahi,” tin ahung seiyun ahi.
Aman adonbut’in, “Israel phunga amangsa heng tailou a-danga dinga kisol kahipoi,” ati.
Ahin numeinu chu ahungin,” Pakai, neihutan,” tin chibai aboh-in ahi.
Chuin aman adonbut’in, “Chate changlhah lahpeh a uichate koma se-lhah aphapoi,” ati.
Chuin amanun, “Ahinai, Pakai; ijeh-inem itile uichan jong apu dokhang chung-a kona amal lhajah chu anekhaji,” ati.
Chutah-in Jesun adonbut’in, “Numei, natahsan alen’e; nalunggot bang chu hita hen,” atin ahi. Chuin chuche pettah a pat chun achanu chu adamtai.
Chujouvin Jesu chukoma kon chun achen Galilee dillen kom ageiyin mol chungah akaltouvin hikoma chun atoutai.
Hichun mipi tamtah ahungun elbai, mitcho, paomo, lhemvei le adang tamtah ahin puiyun, akengphang bul’ah aleh lha-uvin; chuin a man amaho chu aboldamsoh tai.
Chuti chun mipi chun paomon thu aseiya, lhemvei adamhela, elbaiyin lam ajot, mitchon kho amu chu amu’uvin kidang asauvin Israel Pathen avah-choitauvin ahi.

Chuin Jesun aseijuite chu ahenga akouvin ajah uva, “Hiche mihon pi hi kalungasei, ijeh-inem itile amaho kakoma aum nau tun ni thum ahitai, chule neh ding imacha anei pouve. Chule amaho an nelouvin kalhadoh nompoi; chutile lampia lhasampa get’unte,” ati.
Chuin aseijuiten adonbut’in, “Mi hijatpi nehva khop ding hikom gamthip laiya changlhah hoiya kila ding ham?” atiuve.
Chuin Jesun ajah uva, “Changlhah pheng ijat naneiyum?” a tile; amahon, “Pheng sagi le nga neo them khat aume,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman mipi chu tol’a touvin asoltan ahi.
Chuin changlhah sagi le nga chu alan akipana thu aseiyin, chuin ahehbal bal’in aseijuite apen, aseijuiten mipi chu ahoppeh-un ahi.
Chuin abon-chauvin aneuvin ava soh keiyun, aneh moh-u ahal chu longkai sagi aloh dimun ahi.
Anea chu numei le chapang tailou-vin mi sang li ahiuve.
Chuin aman miho chu alhah doh jouvin kong sunga alut’in Magadan gamkai lama achetai.
Chuin Pharisee ho le Sadducee ho ahenga ahungun apatep nan van a kona melchihna khat avetsahna dinguvin athumun ahi.
Aman adonbut-in, “Nanghon nilhah le ‘Vansan asoh-e, kho phading ahi,’ natiuve.
Chule jingkah le, “Vansan asoh-in van anime, kho phalou ding ahi,’ natiuve. Nanghon van umchan suhtoje vang naheuvin, phat umchan melchihna nasuto theipouve.
Migilou mijong khanga miten melchihna ahol’uve, ahinla Jonah melchihna tailou adang kipelou ding ahi, ati. Chuin amaho chu adalhan achemangtai.
Chuin gal lang khat agalkaiyun asei-juiten changlhah ahinpo haitauvin ahi.
Hichun Jesun ajah uva, “Pharisee te le Sadducee te chol lah a chingtheiyun kihong phauvin,” ati.
Amaho chun, “Ahe! Changlhah ikengtapouve,” tin aki-hou lhiuvin ahi.
Jesun hichu ahedoh-in ajah uva, “Vo tahsan lhom ho, changlhah nanei lou jeh uva ibola kihou hou nahiu vem?
Mi sang nga changlhah pheng nga a chu paipeh ijat nalodoh uva,
chule mi sang li changlhah pheng sagia chu longkai ijat nalodoh uvem, hichu hedoh loulai chule gel jong geldoh loulai nahiu vem?
Keiman nangho jah a changlhah thu kasei ahipoi, ibola helou nahiu vem? Pharisee ho le Sadducee ho chol lah a kihong phauvin, kati ahibouve,” ati.
Chutah chun changlhah chol lah a ati hilouvin, Pharisee ho le Sadducee ho thuhil lah a chingtheiyun, ati ahi chu ahedoh tauve.
Chuin Jesu Caesarea Philippi gam-kol sung ageiyin aseijuite jah a, “Mihon Mihem Chapa hi koi ahi atiuvem?” tin adongin ahi.
Chuin amahon, “Kim khat’in ‘John Baptist ahi,’ atiuvin; kim khat’in ‘Elijah ahi,’ atiuvin; kim khat’in, ‘Jeremiah ahi, ahiloule themgao ho lah a khatpen ahi,’ atiuve,” tin aseiyun ahi.
Aman amaho jah a, “Nang honla koi ahi neitiuvem?” ati.
Chuin Simon Peter in adonbut’in, “Nangma Pathen hing Chapa Christa chu nahi, ”ati.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah a, “John chapa Simon, anun nom nahi; ijeh-inem itile tahsaphe le thisan in aphondoh hilouvin van a um ka-Pan aphondoh joh ahi-bouve
Chule keiman jong nangma jah a kasei ahi, ‘Nangma Peter nahi, chule hiche songpi chunga hi Kahoubung ka-sahdoh ding ahi; chule mithi kho kul kotpin aneh jou lou ding ahi.
Keiman nangma van gam kot heh kapeh ding nahi; chule leiset chunga nangman nakha chan chu van a jong kikhah ding ahi. Chule leiset chunga nangman nahon chan chu van a jong kihong ding ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin ama Christa ahi chu “Koima jah a seidoh hih-un,” tin asei-juite chu ahil chah-in ahi.

Chuche jou chun Jesu Christan Jerusalem a achea upa ho le thempu pipui ho chule danthu sun hoa kona thil tamtah athoh a chule akitha a, chule ni thum nia kaithouva aum tei ding danje chu aseijuite ahil pantan ahi.
Chuin Peter in ama chu apuidoh-in, “Pathen lungset’in chutobang chu nachunga chu louhel ding ahi,” tin abelhatan ahi.
Ahin ama akiheiyin Pater jah a, “Ka-nunglamah chen, satan, nangma keima dingin kipal lhuhna nahi, nangman Pathen thulam gel louvin mihem thulam jeng nagel’e,” ati.
Chuphat’in Jesun aseijuite jah a, “Koi hile kanung eijui noma chun ama kingaitom hen lang athingpel kiput hen lang kanung hinjui hen.
Ijeh-inem itile koi hile ahinna huhhing noma chun achan ding ahi; amavang koi hile keima jal’a ahinna chan a chun akimu ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile min vannoi leiset apumpin neihen lang ahinna chanta le a-ipi phachom ding ham?Ahiloule min ahinna lhenga ipi apeh ding ham?
Ijeh-inem itile Mihem Chapa a-Pa loupina a Avantilte toh hung ding ahi; chule chutengle aman mi athilbol dungjui cheh a asansah ding ahi.
Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, hikoma ding ho kim khat hi Mihem Chapa agama ahung amu kahseuva thina tepkha lou ding aum’uve,” ati.
Chuin ni gup jouvin Jesun Peter toh Jacob leh chule anaopa John toh akipuiyin achomin molsang chung khat’a apuitouvin,
chuin ama amaho ang sungah amel akikhel’in; amaiyin nisa bangin asalvah-in, aponsil chengse chu khovah bangin avam leng jengin ahitai.
Chuin veuvin, Mose le Elijah ahenguva ahung kilah lhonin amatoh akihou lhonin ahi.
Chuin Peterin Jesu jah a, “Pakai, hikoma iumu hi eiho dingin anome, naphasah le nang ding khat, Mose ding khat chule Elijah ding khat, lhambuh thum song ing kate,” ati.

Asei-pettah chun vetau, meibang lhang khat’in amaho chu ahin lekhutan ahi. Chuin mei-lhang lah a kon chun o khat’in, “Hiche hi ka-Chapa deitah ahi, achungah kalung alhai ta ngeiye, athu ngaiyun,” ati.
Chuin aseijuiten chuche ajah phat’un abohkhup’un amaiyu tola asulut’un atija lheh jengun ahi.
Chuin Jesu ahenguva ahungin akhoi-yin, “Thouvun, kicha hih-un,” ati.
Chuin akhodah-un ahile Jesu changseh tailou adang koima amutapouvin ahi.
Chuin mola kona akumsuh phat’in Jesun amaho chu ahilchah-in, “Mihem Chapa athia kona kaithouva aum masangsen hiche nathilmuu hi koima jah a sei hih-un,” tin akhamtan ahi.
Chuin aseijuiten, “Ahi, ibola danthu sun hon, ‘Elijah hung masa tei ding ahi,’ atiu ham?” tin adongun ahi.
Chuin aman adonbut’-in, “Elijah chu hung masa ijakai ahung semphat ding mong ahi.
Ahin kaseipeh nahiuve, Elijah chu hungsa ahitai; hin ama chu ahet loujeh-in achungah anop nop aboltauvin ahi. Mihem Chapan jong chutobangma chu amaho khut’a athoh ding ahi,” ati.
Hitah chun aseijuiten ajah uva John Baptist thu asei ahi, ti chu ahetauvin ahi.
Chuin mipi lah ahung lhun un mi khat ahungin a-angah adilsun ajah a,
“Pakai, kachapa lungset’in, abuhthi ahin athohgim behseh jenge, abang le meiyah, a bang le twiya alhu lhoijin ahi.
Chule naseijuite henga kahinpui le la aboldamjou pouvin ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesun, “Vo tahsanna nei lou le khang lamvai mite, itih chan kaumpi dingu nahiu vem? Itih chan ka-kho ngai ding nahiu vem? Ama chu kahenga hin hinpui tangu,” tin adonbut’in ahi.
Chuin Jesun thilha chu aphoh-in ahile asunga konin apottai. Chuchea pat chun chapang chu adamtai.
Chuphat’in aseijuite Jesu henga ahungun guhthimin “Iatile keihon kanodoh jou louvu hinte,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuin aman, “Natahsan lhom jeh-u ahi; ijeh-inem itile tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, nanghon tahsanna ankammu tebep nei hileu chun hiche mol jah a hin ‘Hikoma konin khukoma khun ki-chonin,’ tiuvin, kichon jeng ding ahi. Nangho dinga imacha bolmo umlou ding ahi,
Ahin hitobang hi an ngola taona beiyin ahungdoh ji poi?” ati.
Chuin Galilee gamsunga ava le khom laiyun Jesun ajah uva, “Mihem Chapa hi mihemte khut’a kipedoh ding kon ahi;
chule amahon atha dingu ahi, chule ni thum ni le kaithouva um ding ahi,” ati. Hiphat chun alung dong lheh jengtauvin ahi.
Capernaum ahung geiyun makhai dong ho ahungun Peter jah a, “Nahilpau khun makhai kai ateji lou ham?” tin adongun ahile, Peter in, “Tejiven,” ati.

Ahin Peter insunga aga lut le Jesun ajah a, “Iti nagel em, Simon? Leiset lengte hin kai hijongle sum lam man hijongle koi lah a adon jiuvem? Achateu lah a adonu, midang lah a adonum?” tin anahou masatai.
Chuin, “Midang lah a,” tia adonbut phat’in Jesun “Ahile acha anaote cheng onga hiya chula.

Hitajong le nangma dillam ah chen lang nga gakoiyin; nga na-koidoh masapen chu lan lang akam keh le chun dangka cheng khat namu ding ahi. Hichu choiyin lang igoma dingin gapetan, achutilou le lung himosah get hite,” ati.
Hiche pettah chun seijuite Jesu henga ahungun, “Van gama hi koi alenpen ham?” tin adongun ahi.
Chuin Jesun chapang neocha khat ahengah akouvin alaiyuva adinsah-in,
“Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, nangho nakile heiyuva chapang neocha ho toh nabah kit louvu le itinama jong le van gam nalut lou dingu ahi.
Hiche jeh a chu hiche chapang neocha banga kineosah chu van gama alenpen ahi.
Chule koi hijongle hitobang chapang khat keima min a sanga chun keima eisan ahi.
“Ahin koi hijongle keima eitahsan hiche aneocha ho lah a khat kipal lhuhsah chan chu angonga sumhei song lentah kikhai hen twikhanglen thuh tah sunga kilhah lut le ama dingin aphajoi.
Ohe kipal lhuh jeh-in vannoi leiset ada na-e! Kipal lhuhna chu um tei ding mong vang ahi, ahinla ohe kipal lhuhsah a chu koi hile ada na-e!

Chule nakhut ahim, nakeng ahim khatjo sangin nakipal lhuh sah a ahile tan bongin lang paimangin; khut ni keng ni neiya tonsot kemlou meikonga nakilelut sangin, ti bukim lou le kengbaiya hinna a lut le chun nang dingin aphajoi.
Chule namit’in nakipal lhuh sah a ahile kaldoh-in paimangin, mit ni neiya damun meikonga nakilelut sangin mitlang chon hinna a lut le chun nang dingin aphajoi.
“Kihong phauvin, hiche aneocha ho lah a khatcha jong nahsahmo hih-un; ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Avantilteuvin vanah vana um ka-Pa mai chu amu jinguve. Chule iti na ngaitou vem!
Amangsa ho chu huhhing dinga Mihem Chapa chu hunga ahi.
Mi khat’in kelngoi ja khat aneiya alah a khat ava mangthah a ahile, aman som ko le ko chu adalhah a mol chung lama chea avah mangthah khat chu aga holji lou ham?
Achule ahol chu amua ahile tahbeh a kasei ahi, amapa chun avah mangthah lou som ko le ko chunga sang chun hiche khat chunga chun akipah jon ahi.
Chutobang chun hiche aneocha ho lah a khattou amanthah ding hi van a um na-Pau lunglam ahipoi.
“Chule nasopi nachunga achonset tah a ahile chen lang nang le ama changseh het’in asetna chu phoh-in; chua angaiya ahile sopi chu nanei ahitai.
Angailou vang le ahetoh dingin mi ni le thum kama thu jouse kichetna dingin ni hile thum hile kipuiyin.
Chule chucheng sei jong angai lou laiya ahile Houbung henga lhut’in; chua Houbung thu jong angaisam louva ahile ama chu nangho dingin chidang namdang le kaidong ho banghen.”
“Tahbeh a kasei ahi, itobang hijongle leiset chunga nakhau chu van a jong kikhah ding ahi, leiset chunga nahonu chu van a jong kihong ding ahi.
Tahbeh a kaseipeh kit nahiuve, leiset chunga hin nalah uva mi ni lung khattah a thil thum neiya ataova ahile, athum chanu chu van a um ka-Pan abulhit peh dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile hoikom hijongle mi ni hile thum hile kamin a akikhop nau chan a chun alah uva kei aum nai,” ati.
Chupettah chun Peter ahenga ahungin ajah a, “Pakai, kasopin kachunga ijatvei achonset le ka ngaidam ding ham? Sagivei geiyin em?” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Najah a sagivei geiyin katipoi; amavang sagi munsom sagivei geiyin kati-jobouve.
Hijeh chun van gam thu hi lengpa khat asohte toh sum sutoh dinga kigoa toh kitekah thei ahi.
Asuto pantan ahile, alah uva khat ama talent sang som batpa chu ahenga ahinkai tauvin ahi.
Apeh ding ima anei lou jeh-in apakaipa chun amatoh aji chatetoh anei chengse joh a chule dit dingin thu apetan ahi.
Achuti phat’in asohpa chun aboh khup’-in chibai aboh-in, ‘Pakai, nei kho ngaita din, abonin sadoh kit nange,’ ati.
Hichun apakaipan alungset’in alhadoh-in asumbat jongchu abeisah-in angai damtai.
Amabou chuche sohpa chu apotdoh phat’in asoh chanpi khat dangka som nga bat amun ahile, amanin alol ameh-in ajah a, ‘Neipeh ding chengse chu neipe tang,’ ati.
Achuti phat’in asohchanpi pan aboh khup’a ahenga ataovin, ‘Nei kho ngaita din, keiman nang sa nange,’ ati.
Ahivangin ama anom hih-in apeh ding chengse chu apeh kahsen songkula aga khumtan ahi.
Chuin asohchanpi hon achuti umchan chu amu’uvin alung phamo lheh-un apakaipau henga ahungun thu umchan jouse chu ahung hiltauvin ahi.
Chuphat’in apakaipan akoma akou lut’-in ajah a, “Vo soh nunse, kahenga natao jeh a nabat chengse kabeisah a kangaidam ahitai.
Achutile keiman nang kalungset banga chu nangin jong nasoh chanpi nalungset ding thu hilou ham?’ ati.
Chuin apakaipa alung hangin a bat chengse asah chaisoh kahsen mi bol gentheiho khut’a apedoh tai.
Nanghon nasopiteu lung giltah cheh a nangai-dam louvu le chutobanga chu nabol dingu ahi,” ati.
Chuin hiti hin aum in ahi, Jesun thu hicheng chu asei jouvin Galilee a pat’in akipatdoh-in Jordan gal Judea gamkol lamah achen,
mi tamtah-in ajuiyin hikoma chun amaho chu aboldam in ahi.
Chuin Pharisee ho ahenga ahungun apatep nan, “Ima jeh jousea min aji ada dan ngai hinam?” tin adongun ahi.
Chuin aman adonbut’in, “Asempan a-semtila amaho numei le pasala asemsa ahitai.
Chule hichejeh chun min anu apa adalhah a ajia beh ding ahi; chule amani chu ti khat hi lhon ding ahi, ti chu nanghon nasim khah louvu ham?
Hiti chu ahin amani pumni mi ni hita louvin ti khat ahilhon tai. Hichejeh chun Pathen gopsa chu mihemin sukhen hih hen,” ati.
Amahon ajah a, “Ahile ibola Mose’n kidana lekha peh-a da ding tia thu apeh ham?” atiuve.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Nalungtah jeh uva Mose’n naji da dingu aphal ahibouve; ahivangin atil’in chutobang chu ahipoi.
Keivangin kasei ahi, koi hijongle mitoh ajon jeh tailouva aji da a ji dang nei chan chu ajonga ahi,” ati.
Hichun aseijuiten ajah a, “Chutia numei pasal kiloimat dol thua pasal chunga chutobang thu ahile jinei hi aphapoi,” atiuvin ahi.
Aman ajah uva, “Hiche hi mi jouse jop thei ahipoi, akipete bouvin ajop thei ahi.
Mi anu sunga thaidepsa penga aumin, abang mihem semthu ahin, adangse chu Pathen gamjal’a amaho kibol aume; ajop theipan jop hen,” ati.
Chupettah chun achunguva akhut angap’a ataopeh dingin chapang ho henga ahinpuiyun ahile aseijuiten ana-phoh-un ahi.
Jesun ajah uva, Chapang ho chu kahenga hungsah-un, jada hih-un; ijeh-inem itile van gam chu hitobang te hoa bou ahi,” ati.
Chuti chun aman achunguvah akhut angamin, chu-kom muna kon chun akipatdoh tai.
Chuin veuvin, mi khat ahenga a-hungin ajah a, “Houhil, tonsot hin kemlou kanei theina dinga thilpha ipi kabol ding ham?” tin adongin ahi.
Chuin Jesun ajah a, ‘Thilpha thudol ibola neidoh ham? Apha khatseh bou aume; ahinla nangma hinna a chu nalut noma ahile thupeh chengse nit tan,” ati.
Mipa chun, “Thupeh hoi hoi chuem?” atin ahile, Jesun adonbut’jn ajah a, ‘Tol that hih-in, jon bol hih-in, gucha hih-in, thu jouvin mi heh hih-in,
nanu napa jabol’in, nang nakingailut bangin naheng nakom ngailun,” ati.
Gollhangpa chun adonbut’in, “Hichengse chu kanitsoh nai, ipi kabatnah laiyem?” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Nangman chamkimsoh ing natile, chen lang nanei chengse gajoh-in mivaicha gentheiho petan, chutile vana gou nanei ding ahi, chule hungin lang kanung hinjuiyin,” ati.
Ahivangin gollhangpa chun chuche thuhil ajah phat chun gou haotah ahijeh-in lungnom mo tah-in ache mangtan ahi.
Hijeh chun Jesun aseijuite jah a, “Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, mihao dingin van gama lut ahahsai.
Kaseipeh kit nahiuve, mihao Pathen gama alut sangin heobil homa sangongsao lut abaijoi,” ati.
Chuin chuche ajah phat’un aseijuiten kidang asabehseh jengun, “Chuti ahile koi huhhinga um jou ding ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Hichun Jesun aven ajah uva, “Mihem dingin vang hithei hoi ahipoi, ahin Pathen dingin ijakai ahitheiye, ati.
Chuphat’in Peter in adonbut’in Jesu jah a, “Vetemin, keihon ka-ima jouseu kadalhauvin nanung kahinjui tauve; achutile keihon ipi kasan dingu ham?” ati.

Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, semthahna a Mihem Chapa aloupina laltouna a atou teng le nangho eijui chengse jong hi laltouna som le nia natouvuva Israel phung som le phung phung ni thu natan dingu ahi.
Chule keima min jal’a a-in, asopite, asopinute, anu, apa achate chule agam leiset hindalha chan chun ajatja tamtah amube ding, chule tonsot hin kemlou chang ding ahi.
Amavang amasa chengse tamtah nukhah intin, anukhah cheng masa ding ahi.
“Ijeh-inem itile van gam chu inneipu khat jingpitah a alengpi leiya goi dinga natong ding hola chetobang ahi.
Chuin ama chun natong ding ho chutoh ni khat’a seki ni lo dingin akihoupin aleiya asoltai.
Vai nungin apotdoh-in kaithela mohjena ding ho amun ajah uva,
‘Nangho jong lengpi laiya konun; adol dol’in nape nau ving kate, atin amaho chu achetauvin ahi.
Chuin sun kimvel le ni kiheiyin apotdoh-in chutobangma chun abol kit’in ahi.
Chuin vaiche phattah-in ama apotdoh-in ahile midang dingle ho chu amun, ajah uva, ‘Ibola sun nilhum keiya mohjena nadinu ham?’ atile, amahon, ‘Koima eigoiyuva aumpoi,’ tin adonbut’uve.
Aman ajah uva, ‘Kalengpi leiya konun, ati.
Nilhah ahi phat’in lengpi lei neipa chun asum chingpa jah a, ‘Natong ho kouvin lang atha manu pen lang goi nukhah pen a pat’in goi masah pen a chaiyin,’ ati.
Chuin vaiche phat’a kigoipan ho chu ahung phat’un seki ni cheh asang tauvin ahi.
Chuin goi masah pen ho chu ahung phat’un, ‘Kisang tam cheh inte,’ ti angaitouvin, amala amahon jong seki ni cheng bou asang tauvin ahi.
Chuin hichu akilah-un inneipu chunga chun aphun tauvin ahi.
Amahon, ‘Anu nung hon nidan kah khat bou na atongun, nangman keiho nisa hah lai thoh a tong gim chengtoh nei kibahsah-un ahi,’ atiuvin ahi.
Aman adonbut’in alah uva khatpa jah a, ‘Kajol, nachungah kakhelna aumpoi: seki ni dinga chu ikihou hi lou ham?
Natha man sum kilah-in chetan, anu nungpenpa hi nang kapeh jatma chu kapeh nom in ahi.
Kanei nahnah kanop nopma kabol chu kadih lou ham? Ole kaphat jeh a hi neimit thip hitam?’
Chutobang chun anukhah masan tin, amasa nukhah ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesu Jerusalem lama achetou konin som le ni ho chu atumin gam choma apuiyin lam dungah ajah uva,
“Veuvin, Jerusalem jonin ichetouvui; chule Mihem Chapa hi thempu pipuiho le danthu sun ho khut’a pehdoh a um ding; chule amaho chun athina dinga themmo achansah dingu ahi;
chule a-el el’a abol’uva, ajep’uva, thingpel’a khetbeh dinga chi-dang namdangte khut’a apehdoh dingu ahi; chule ni thum ni le ama kaithouva um ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche pettah chun Zebedee chate anu’uvin achate ni chu ahinpuiyin Jesu henga ahungun chibai aboh-in ahenga ikhat thum nan ataovin ahi.
Aman amanu jah a, “Iham nalung ngai?” a tin ahile; a man, “Nagam sunga ka-chate ni hi khat najet’a khat naveiya atou theina lhon ding thu pen,” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Nanghon nathumu chu nahet louvu ahi. Kadonna ding khon a hi nadon ngam lhon ding hinam?” atin ahile, amanin, “Ka ngame,” ati lhonin ahi.
Chuin aman, “Kadonna ding khon a vang chu nadon dingu ahin, kajet le kaveiya tousah ding vang chu keima peh dol ahipoi; ka-Pan adinguva agotsaho bou chu kipe ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun som ho chun hichu ajauvin uchate ni chunga chun alung phamo tauvin ahi.
Ahinla Jesun amaho chu akouvin ajah uva, “Nang hon naheuve, chidang namdangte chunga vaipo ho khu apakaiyun aumin chule milen milalte hon achunguva athunei nau apan jiuve.
Nangho lah a vang chuti chu ahipoi, ahin koi hile nangho lah a alen hi noma chu nalhachauva pang ding ahi;
chule nalah uva apipuipen hi noma chu nasoh-u hiding ahi.
Chu-tobanga chu Mihem Chapatah jong chu jen dinga hung hilouvin ajenle ding le mi tamtah lhatdohna a ahinna toh dingjoh a hung ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jericho khopia kona akipatdoh-in mipi tamtah-in anung ajuiyun ahi.
Chule vetau, mitcho ni lampamah atou lhonin amani chun lampi chu Jesun ajot’e, ti ahet phat lhonin, “Pakai, David Chapa, neilungset lhonin,” tin asam lhon in ahi.“
