Amaho mipi chun, “Thip beh-in um lhonin” tin aphoh-un; ahivangin amanin ahasap cheh lhonin, “Pakai David Chapa, neilungset lhonin,” ati lhonin ahi.
Chuin Jesu adingin amani chu akouvin, I lo-lhon leng nalung lhon ham?” ati.
Amanin, “Pakai, kamit lhon hasah-in,” ati lhone.
Chuin Jesun alung asen amit lhon akhoipeh-in ahile, amanin kho amupai jeng lhonin chule anung ajui lhontai.
Chuin Jerusalem ahung naiyuva Olive mol a Bethphage agei tah-un, Jesun aseijuite mi ni asol’in ajah lhona,
“Namasang jon lhona kho sunga khun lut lhonin lang sangan anoutoh kihen namu paijen lhon ding ahi; hichu sut lhonin lang kahenga hinkai lhonin.
Mi khattou ikhat sei aum le, ‘Pakaiyin hiche teni hi manna nom aneiye,’ ti lhon le chun aman nahin solpai jeng ding ahi.
Themgao kama kisei thu:
‘Nanghon Zion chanu jah a, Ven, nalengpa lung nemtah-in Sangan chungah, sangan nou chungah, Atouvin nahengah ahunge,’ tin seiyun, ti chu guilhunna dinga chuti ahitai,” ati.
Chuti chun aseijuite ni chu ache lhonin Jesun asei bang bang chun abol lhonin;
sangan le sangan nou ahinpuiyun a-chunga apon u aphauvin; achunga chun Jesu atouve.
Chuin mipi lah a atamjon lam dunga aponu aphauvin, adangsen theoboh alham un lam dunga aphauvin ahi.
Chule mipi amasang lama che chengse le anungjui chengse chun: “Ho-sana, David Chapa, Pakai min a hungpa chu anun nome; Chung nung pena Hosana!” atiuvin asam asamun ahi.
Chuin Jerusalem khopi sung alut phat’-un, “Hiche hi koiham?” tin akho pum-pin akilohsoh jengun ahi.
Chuin mipi chun adonbut’un, “Hiche hi Galilee gam Nazareth khoa kon Themgao Jesu ahi,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin Jesu houin’ah alut’in houin sunga thil johho le thil cho ho abonchan anodoh-in, chule sumlheng ho dokhangle vakhu joh ho touna chu alekhup peh-in ajah uva,
“Ka-in chu taona in kiti ding ahi,’ tin akisune; ahin nanghon gucha mi-chom kokhuh-in nasem tauve,” ati.
Chuin houin achun mitcho le elbai ho ahungun aman amaho chu aboldam in ahi.
Ahin thempu pipuiho le danthu sun hon athil-bol kidang le houin a chapang hon, “Hosana, David Chapa” tia asap chu amu’uvin, alung phamo lheh jeng tauvin ajah a,
“Hite ho hin ipi aseiyu najah nah em?” atiuvin ahi. Jesun, “Kajanai, ‘Naosen le chapang noine lai kamin jong vahchoina nacham kimsah tai,’ ti chu nasimdoh louvu ham?” ati.
Chuti chun aman amaho chu adalhan khopia konin apotdoh-in Bethany a achen chua chun ageh tai.
Chuin jingkah-in khopi lam ajot kit’in agil akeltan ahi.

Chuin aman lamkenga theichang phung khat amun, aphunga achen ahile ana tailou imacha aga aumpoi. Chuin aman, “Imatih chanin naga ga kitta hih hen,” atin ahile chu-pettah chun theichang phung chu agoppai jengtai.
Hichu aseijuiten amu phat’un alung dong jengun, “I atile theichang phung chu goppai jenga hitante,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Keiman tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, nanghon gingcha lel louhela tahsan naneiyu le hiche theichang phung hitia bolseh hilouvin hiche mol jonghi ‘Hikoma konin kichondoh in lang twikhanglena kileh luttan,’ ti jongleu chun hithei ding ahi.
Chule tahsan tah a taona a nathum chanu chu aboncha namusoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin houin a alut’a thu ahil pet’in thempu pipuiho le miho upa ho ahenga ahungun, “Ipi thuneina a hiti ho hi nabol ham? Kon hiche thuneina hi napeh ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Ken jong nangho thu khat dong ing kate; hichu naseiyu le ken jong ipi thuneina hicheng kabol ahi seipeh nau vinge;
John Baptize bol chu hoiya kon ham? Van a konha mihema kon ham?” ati.
Chuin amaho aki ngaitouvin, “Van a kon ahi, tileu hen la, mi jousen John chu themgao ahi, ti angaito jeh chun mipi ikichauvin ahi,” akitiuvin ahi.
Chuti chun amahon Jesu adonbut’un, “Kahe pouve,” atitauvin ahi. Aman jong amaho jah a, “Achutile ipi thuneiya hicheng kabol keiman jong seipeh deh pou vinge,” ati.
Ahivangin iti nangaitou vem? Mi koi ham khat’in chapa ni aneiyin ama khat henga achen ajah a, “Chapa, tunin lengpi leiya konin lang na gatongin,” ati.
Aman, “Kanompoi, cheponge,” tin adonbut’in ahivangin khonungin alung aheiyin achetan ahi.
Chuin khatjo henga achen, ajah a chutobangma chun agaseiyin ahi.

Aman, “Pah, che nange,” tin adonbut’in che la achetapon ahi. Hite ni chu koijoh chu apa lunga chon ham?” atileh, amahon “Amasajoh chu” atiuvin ahi. Chuin Jesun ajah uva, “Tah-beh a kaseipeh nahiuve, nangho sanga kaidong ho le noti ho Pathen gamsunga lut masajo ding ahiuve.

Ijeh-inem itile John chu chonphatna lampia nahenguva ahungin nanghon la nana tahsan pouve, kaidong hole notihon bou anatahsan uvin ahi. Nangho vangin chuche namu u jong chu natahsan theina dingun kho-nungin nalung nahei chomdeh pouvin ahi.

Thulem chom khat jong ngai kit’un, mi khat inneipu ahin lengpi lei abol’in, pal’in aumkimvel’in, lengpiga chil lhahna pum alai yin insang asan, chuin aleilhou ho khut’a apedoh-in mi gamdanga a-chemang tai.
Chuin aga phat anaiyin atheiga la dingin aleilhou ho henga asohte asoltan ahi.
Ahin aleilhou ho chun anaman un khat avouvin, khat athat’un, athumna pa songin asep’un ahi.
Asohte dang amasa ho sanga tamjo asol kit’in ahile amahon angaina bep’in anabol’un ahi.
Akhonna-in aman, “Kachapa hi anaja domun te,” a tin achapa ahenguva asoltai.
Ahinla lengpi leilhou hon acha-pa chu amu phat’un amaho le amaho akihouvun, “Ama hi agou lo dinga ahi; hungun that’u hiting agou lo ding eiho changu hite,” akitiuvin ahi.
Chuin ama chu amanun lengpi lei polamah akaidoh-un athat tauvin ahi.
Hijeh chun lengpi lei neipa chu ahung teng chuche aleilhou ho chu ilontem?” ati.
Amahon ajah a, “Chuche migilou ho chu aman engsanin sugam intin aga phatseh a atheiga ape ding leilhou dang khut’a alengpi lei chu pedoh tante.” atiuvin ahi.
Jesun ajah uva, ‘In sa hon adei mouva apaiyu songchu Aninga songpipen in apang tai; Hiche hi Pakaiya kon ahi. Chule imitmu’uvin akidange,’ ti Pathen lekhabua thu hi nasimdoh khah louvu ham?
Hichejeh a chu keiman nangho jah a kasei ahi, nang hoa kona Pathen gam kilamanga agadohsah namdang mite kipe ding ahi.
Koi hijongle hiche song chunga lhua chu ahal hala chip ding ahi, chule koi hile achunga chuche song chua leivui banga kithejal ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin thempu pipui ho le Pharisee hon hiche athulem sei chu ajah phat’un amaho chunga thusei ahi chu ahedoh tauvin ahi.
Chuin ama chu mat dingin agouvin, ahivangin themgao ahi, tia angaito jeh un mipi chu akichauvin ahi.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva thulemin asei kit’in,
“Lengpa khat’ in achapa ji pui nin golvah abol’in agol-vahna a dinga agotte ho kou dingin asohte asol’in,
ahinla amaho chu a hung nom-pouvin ahi; van gam chutobang chu ahi.

Chuin aman asohte asol kit’in, ‘Akikou ho henga cheuvin lang, “Veuvin golvahna an aphasadema kagot ahitai kabongchal le kagancha thao ho akithat tai, chule abonchan phasademin gotsan aumsoh tai; nangho moupui golvahna a hunguvin,’ ati.
Ahivangin don a neipeh louvin ache mang gamtauvin ahi.
Khat alouva achen, khat sumkol veiyin achen, adangsen asohte chu amanun nahsah mo tah-in abol’un athat tauvin ahi.
Hichun lengpa alung hang tan asepaite chengse asol’in chuche tolthat ho chu asumang hel’un akhou jong ahalpeh tauvin ahi.
Chutah-in asohte jah a ‘Golvahna an gotsa ahitai, ane dinga kakoute ho la anehoi ahipouve.
Hijeh chun lamkathomah cheuvin lang mi namu chanu golvah an ne dingin gakouvun,’ ati.
Chuti chun asohte chu apot’un lampi dunga acheuvin amu chanu mipha mise apui khomun ahile golvahna indan chu jin adimsettan ahi.
Chuin lengpa jin ho velen ahungin ahile moupuina von kivon lou mi khat amudoh tan ahi.
Aman, “Kajol, moupuina vona kivon louva hikoma iti nahung lut ham?” tin adongin ahile amapa sei ding helouvin aumtan ahi.
Chuphat’in lengpan asottolle ho jah a, “Akhut akeng kanun lang polam muthim lah a paidoh tauvin, hikoma chu ka le Hagel um ding ahi.
Akikou vang tamtah ahin lhendoh vang lhomcha ahi,” ati.
Chuin Pharisee hon thu seiya mat theina ding duha abol’un akihou tauvin ahi.
Chuin aseijuiteu chu Herod miho toh asol’un amaho chun ajah a, “Houhil, nangma mi dih tah nahi, dih tah a Pathen lampi chu nahil ahin chule koima gin naneipoi, ti kaheuve; nangman mi mai navepoi.
Hijeh chun Caesar kai kapeh-u hi dan ngai hina hilou ham? Nalung iti na ngaitom, neiseipeh-un,” atiuvin ahi.
Jesun la alung gilou vop’u chu ahen, “Vo mipha lhem ho, ibola neilunglah-u ham?
Kai sum chu neivetsah-un,” atin ahile, amahon denarius khat ahin choiyun ahi.
Hiche hi koi lim le koi min ham?” tin adongin ahile, “Caesar a ahi,” tin adonbut’un ahi.
Chuphat’in aman, “Caesar a chu Caesar peuvin lang Pathena chu Pathen petang u,” ati.
Chuche ajah phat’in adatmouvin ama adalhauvin achemang tauvin ahi.
Chuche nima ma chun mithi thokit aumpoi, ti Sadducee ho ahenga ahungun thu ahung dongun,
“Houhil, mi khat cha nei louva athi le asopipan anumeinu chu akichenpia asopipa dinga chi akhaipeh ding ahi, tin Mose’n eihilun ahi.
Ahile tun kalah uva ucha pasal sagi aumun amasapenpa chun ji aneiyin athitai; ahin ama chu chikhai lou ahitah jeh chun ainneipi chu asopipa adalhah peh tai.
Chuti chun abana pa jong, athumnapa jong, asagi napa geiyin chutima chun aumtan ahi.
Akhonna-in anumeinu chu athitai.
Ahile thokitna a amanu chu sagi lah a koipen ji hitantem? Amahon la jia anei soh keiyu ahin,” atiuvin ahi.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Pathen lekhabua thu le Pathen thahatna nahetjoh sangu aum loujeh a nakhel jiu ahi.
‘Thokitna a chun mi akicheng tapouve, chen jong akichensah tapouve. Van a Vantilte tobang ahiuve.
Ahinla mithi thokit dol thu Pathenin najah uva asei,
‘Keima Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, chule Jacob Pathen kahi,’ ati chu simkha lou nahiuvem? Ama athiho Pathen hilouvin ahing ho Pathen ahijobouve,” ati.
Mipi chun hichu ajauvin athuhil chu kidang asa lheh jengun ahi.
Aman Sadducee ho anel khup hel jeng chu ajah phat’un Pharisee ho akikhomun ahi.
Chule alah uva danthu them khat’in apatepnan thu adongin,
“Houhil, chondan thupeh lah a apipen hoi ham?” ati.
Chuin aman adonbut’in, “Nangman nalung pumpin, nalhagao pumpin, chule nalungthim pumpin Pakai na-Pathen chu ngailun.
Hichu thupeh pipen le amasapen ahi.
Chule chutobanga chu anina hiche ahi; ‘Nangma nakingailut bangin naheng nakoma ngailun,’
“Thupeh hiche te nia hin thupeh jouse le themgao ho thu kikhai cheh ahi,” ati.

Aman khat chu talent nga apen, khat talent ni apen, khat talent khat apen, athan ajokhop cheh-in sum apen akipat-doh tai.

Chuin alung dong lheh jengtauvin ajah a, “Pakai kei kahim?” ati cheh tauvin ahi.
Aman adonbut’in “Lhenga kasokhompi pa tah chu eimatsah dinga ahi.
Mihem Chapa achon chan ding thu kisun bang tah a chu che ding mong ahi, ahivangin Mihem Chapa pedoh a matsah dingpa chu Ohe! ada na-e! Ama chu apena penglou hi le ama dinga pha-jota ding ahi.” ati.
Hichun apedoh a pang ding Iscariot Judas chun adonbut’in, “Pakai kei kahim?” a tin ahile, aman “Naki seikhai.” ati.
Chuin an aneh laitah-un Jesun changlhah alan phatthei aboh jouvin aheh bal bal’in aseijuite apen, “Kilah-un neuvin; hiche hi katahsa ahi,” ati.
Chuin khon alan athangvah jouvin amaho chu apen ajah uva, “Nabon chauvin don soh keiyun;
ijeh-inem itile hiche hi chonset suh beina dinga mi tamtah dinga kisodoh kitepna kathisan ahi.
Chule keiman nangho jah a kasei ahi, ka-Pa gam sunga nangho toh athah kadon khom ni ahung lhun kahsea tukal’a hiche lengpiga twi hi kadon kit lou ding ahitai,” ati.
Chuin amahon la asah jouvun apotdoh-un Olive mol lama a-chetauvin ahi.

Chutah chun Jesun ajah uva, “Tujana hi nangho nabon chauva kachunga lungthoi soh kei ding nahiuve; ijeh-inem itile, ‘Keiman kelngoi chingpa kavoh lhuh ding, chutengle kelngoihon chu chehgam ding ahi,’ tin akisune.
Ahin kathodoh nung le Galilee gam lama namasang sanguva kache ding ahi,” ati.
Ahin Peter in adonbut’in ajah a, “Abon chauvin nachungah lungthoi jongleu keima vang itih chan hijongle lungthoi ponge,” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahi, Tujan ah khon masanga thumvei neiseilep ding ahi,” ati.
Peter in ajah a, “Nangma toh thitha ding mong hijong leng keiman nangma seilep hih hel ing kate,” ati. Aseijuite jousen jong chuti chun ati sap cheh-un ahi.
Hichun Jesu amaho chutoh Gethsemane atiu mun khat alhun un aman aseijuite jah a, “Keima khukoma khu kachea kagatao sungsen nangho hikoma hin anatou jingun,” ati.
Chuin Peter le Zebedee chapa teni chu akipuiyin; chule alunghem lheh jengin alungkham pantan ahi.
Chutah chun aman amaho jah a, “Thina khop hel’in kalung hesoh behseh jeng tai; hikoma um un lang neikigin piuvin,” ati.

Chuin amasang lama phabep khat ache chon in akhupbon alhun tolah amai asulut’in ataovin, “Ka-Pa, ahithei le hiche khon hi keiya konin kitolmang hen; ahivangin keima lung got bang hilouvin nangma lung got bang hijohen,” ati.
Chuin aseijuite henga ahungin ahile amaho chu ana-ihmut lhuh gamu ahung toh-in Peter jah a, “Nanghon nidan khat kah cha jong nei hiti kiginpi jou louvu ham?
Lhepna a nalhah louna dingun kigingun taovun; lhagao vangin ago nan tahsan ajoupi,’ ati.
Chuin aniveina-in ache kit’in ataovin, “Ka-Pa, hiche khona kadon louva kitolmang thei lou ahile nangma thu thu hihen,” ati.
Chuin ahung kit’in ahile amaho chu a-ihmut lhuh-u ahung toh-in ahi; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu a-ihmut soh lheh jengun ahi.
Chuti chun amaho chu adalhan athumveina-in ache kit’in ataovin asei ngai bangma chu asei kit’in ahi.
Chutah-in aseijuite hengah ahungin ajah uva, “Ahile tun ihmu’vin lang kitha ol tauvin; veuvin phat alhing tai, chule Mihem Chapa hi michonsete khut’a kipedoh ahitai.
Kipat’un chetau hite; veuvin eipedohpa ahung naitai,” ati.
Chuin hichu asei nalaiyin veuvin som le ni lah a Judas chu thempu pipuiho le miho upa ho koma kona chemjam le moltum hinthoa hungkon mipi nasatah chutoh ahung lhonin ahungtan ahi.
Ama pedoh a pangpa chun amaho chu melchihna ahil masan, “Keiman kachop pen pen chu ama ahi, ama chu manun,” ati ahi.
Chuin ama chun Jesu heng ajonpaiyin, “Rabbi, chibai,” atin achop chuh chuh tan ahi.
Chuin Jesun ajah a, “Kajol, nahunglo nabol ding ding chu boltan,” ati. Chutah-in amaho chun akom ahin naiyun Jesu chungah akhut alhauvin amantauvin ahi.
Chuin veuvin, Jesu loiho khat’in akhut alamin achemjam asatdoh-in thempu chungnung sohpa asatle abilkol lang khat asat lhan ahi.
Chuphat’in Jesun ajah a, “Nachemjam chu akoina a koi kit’in; ijeh-inem itile chemjam pante chu chemjama lou ding ahiuve;
ole tutah jenga jong hi ka-Pan a-Vantil janel som le ni sanga tamjo eihin solpeh nadinga kathum theilouva na-ngaitom?
Ahinla chutin kibol le hitia hi thu soh tei ding ahi, tia lekha kisun chu iti guilhun ding ham?” ati.

Hichepet chun Jesun mipi chengse jah a chun, “Gucha michom man dinga kon banga chemjam le moltum nahinthouva keima man dinga nahung konu ham? Keima houinah niseh-in katouvin thu kahil jingin, chulaiyin la neiman pouvin ahi.
Amavang themgao lekha sut thu guilhunna dinga hichengse hi aboncha soh-a ahitai,” ati. Chutah chun aseijuite jousen ama adalhauvin ajam gamtauvin ahi.
Chuin Jesu man ho chun danthu sun ho le upa ho kikhopna Caiaphas atiu thempu chungnung henga chun akaiyun ahi.
Peter vang chun galkanga ajuipeh-in thempu chungnung inpi leitol geiyin ajuiyin, hikoma chun alut’in “Achaina munge,” tin sottol ho lah a chun atouvin ahi.
Hichun thempu pipui ho le hou vaipoloi chengsen Jesu thana dingin achungah hettohsah jou thu aholun;
jou thu hettohsah tamtah ahung vangun amupouvin ahi.
Ahin ajouvin mi ni ahungin, “Hichepa hin ‘Keima Pathen houin susea ni thum sunga sadoh kit thei kahi,’ ati,” ahung tilhonin ahi.
Chuin thempu chungnung chu adingdoh-in ajah a, “Nadonbut lou ding ham? Hite hon nahehsetna a thu aseiyu hi ipi ham?” ati.
Ahivangin Jesu thip beh-in aumin ahi. Chuin thempu chungnung chun ajah a, “Keiman nangma Pathen hing mina kahahsela kasol nahi, nangma Pathen Chapa Christa chu nahim? Neiseipeh-un,” ati.
Hichun Jesun ajah a, “Naseikhai; chukalvala kaseipeh nahiuve; tunung kal le nanghon Mihem Chapa thilbol thei jet lama atou le van mei chunga ahung namu dingu ahi,” ati.
Chutah-in thempu chungnung chun apon asat-eh-in, “Hiche hin Pathen ataitom ahi; thu hettohsah dang iding ititah dingu ham? Veuvin, nanghon tun Pathen ataitomna naja tauvin ahi.
Nanghon iti nagel’uvem?” ati. Ahin amahon ‘Thi dinga lom ahi,” tin adonbut’un ahi.
Chutah-in amahon amaiyah chit aset’un, achumun;
chule kimkhat’in abengun, “Vo Christa, gaovin lang seiyin, koiham nabenga chu?” atiuvin ahi.
Hichepet chun Peter polamah leitolah atouvin ahi; hichun sohnu khat ahenga ahungin ajah a, “Nangma jong Galilee mi Jesu toh kiloi chu nahi,” ati.
Ahivangin aman japi angsungah aseilep’in, “Nathusei chu kahepoi.” a titan ahi.
Chuin kelkot phungah ama apotdoh-in ahile sohnu achom khat’in ama chu amun chukoma um ho jah a chun, “’Hichepa jong hi Nazareth Jesu koma uma chu ahi.” ati.
Chuin aman aseilep kit’in. “Hiche mipa chu kahepoi.” tin akihahsel tan ahi.
Chujou phabep’in chukoma um miho chun ahenga ahungun Peter jah a, “Nangma jong amaho lah a khat mong mong nahi; ijeh-inem itile napao chun nangma naphongdoh-e,” atiuvin ahi.
Hiphat chun aman, “Hiche mihempa chu kahe hih hel’e,” tin kigaosap le kihahsel athopantan ahi. Chupettah chun ah akhong tan ahi.
Hichun “Ah khon masanga thumvei neiseilep ding ahi.” tia Jesu thusei chu Peter in ageldoh in, chuin polamah apotdoh-in lhasetah-in hakan akaptan ahi.
Chuin jing ahi phat’in thempu pipui ho chengse le miho upa ho jouse Jesu thana dingin akihoutoh tauvin ahi.
Chule ama chu akanun akaiyun gamvaipo Pilate khut’ah apedoh tauvin ahi.
Chutah-in apedoh a pang Judas chun athi dinga themmo achansah-u chu amun ahile, akisih-in dangka som thum chu thempu pipui ho le upa ho alepeh kit’in,
“Themmona neilou thisan kapehdoh chu kachon khel tai,” ati. Ahinla amahon “Hichu keiho ka-ithu u um am? Nangman nalo nom nom lotang,” atitauvin ahi.
Hichun aman dangka chu houin lailungah asep lhan chukoma kon chun achemangin ama akikhai lihtan ahi.
Chuin thempu pipui hon hiche dangka chu alauvin, “Hiche hi thisan man ahijeh-in sum kholna a koi angai ahipoi,” atiuvin ahi.
Hichun amaho akihoutoh-un gamdang miho vuina dingin hichun beldengpa leiset achouvin ahi.
Hichejeh chun tugeiyin hiche leiset chu thisan leiset akitin ahi.
Hiche tah chun themgao Jeremiah thusei: “Israel chate lah a kona asah sau, Aman kisahpa man chu dangka som thum alauvin ahi;
Chule Pakaiyin eithupeh dungjuiyin, Beldengpa leiset manin apetauvin ahi.” ati chu guilhunga ahitai.
Chujouvin Jesu chu gamvaipo angah adingtan ahile, gamvaipo chun, Nangma Judate lengpa nahim?” tin adongin ahile; Jesun ajah a,” Naseikhai.” ati.
Ahin thempu pipui ho le upa hon ahehsetna thu ijat asei vangun aman imachan adonbutpon ahi.
Chutah-in Pilate’in ajah a, “Hite hon nachunga ahet asei chengseu hi najah lou ham?” ati.
Ahin aman cheng khat cha jong adonbut loujeh chun gamvaipo chun adatmo lheh jengin ahi.
Hiche kut sunga chu sohchang koi hile mihon agotpen penu chu gamvaipo chun alhadohji angai ahi.
Hichepet chun sohchang amin Barabbas atiu sohchang minthang tah khat aumin ahi.
Hijeh chun amaho akikhop phat’un Pilate’in amaho chu adongin, “Koijoh lhadoh peh leng nalungu ham? Barabbas ha Christa kiti Jesu joh ham?” ati.
Ijeh-inem itile thangset suma apehdoh-u ahi chu aman ahen ahi.
Chuin ama thutanna muna atoupet’in ainneipin thu ahinlhan, “Hiche michonphapa chu limsah hih-in, ijeh inem itile ama jeh chun tu nin kamangin kathoh gimta lheh jengin ahi,” ati.
Ahinla thempu pipui ho le upahon Barabbas chu ngeh dingin chule Jesu chu asuhmangsah dingin mipi chu atilse tauvin ahi.
Chuin gamvaipo chun adonbut’in, “Hiche teni hi koijoh lhadohpeh leng nalungu ham?” atile; amahon “Barabbas” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin Pilate’in ajah uva, “Achutile Christa kiti Jesu hi ikalo ding ba hitam?” a tile, amahon, ‘Thingpela kikhenbeh hen.” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman, “Ibol’inem? Ipi subset aneiyem?” ati. Ahivangin amahon hasap tah-in asamun, “Thingpelah kikhen beh hen,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuin Pilate’in anan lel’a abol ima phatsahna ahilou, thunoh baotam asojoh chu amu phat’in, twi alan mipi ang sungah akhut asil lhan. “Hiche michonphapa thisan kisona a themmona neilou kahi; nanghon nalo lo lotauvin,” ati.
Chuin mihon abonchauvin adonbut’un. “Ama thisan phu keiho le kachateu chungah chuhen,” atiuvin ahi.
Chutah-in aman amaho chu Barabbas alhadohpeh-in, Jesu vang chu ajep’in thingpela khetbeh dingin apedoh tan ahi.
Chutah-in gamvaipo sepai ho chun Jesu chu gamvaipopa thutanna inpi sunga apui lut’un akomah sepai hon jouse akikhom soh keiyun;
chule ama pon chu ahoh lhauvin pon san asilpeh tauvin ahi.
Chule ling lukhuh apheh-un akhuhpeh-un, chule akhut jet lamah peng tenggol khat achoisah-un, a-angah adilsu’vin, “Vo Judate lengpa, chibai,” atiuvin tot nopnan a-el el’in abolun ahi.
Chuin chil aset khumun apumpeng choi chu alauvin alu avoh nauvin ahi.
Chutia chu totnopna a a-el el’a abol jouvun pon san chu ahoh lhauvin ama pon asilpeh-un thingpel’a khetbeh dingin apuitauvin ahi.
Chujouvin apotdoh uva acheuvin amin Simon atiu Cyrene gam mi khat amu’vin ama athingpel pu ding chun acham louvin amanun ahi.
Chuin Golgotha atiu mun chu @9(hichu lugu mun ti na ahin)@7 alhun un.
amahon Jesu chu gilkhatoh kihallengpi twi adonsah-un ahile; aman atep’in adon nomtapon ahi.
Chujouvin amahon ama chu thingpel’ah akhen beh-un apon chu vang aveuvin akihomtauve;
chule hikoma chun atouvun ama chu angah tauvin ahi.
“Hichepa hi Jesu Judate lengpa ahi,” tin ahehnau hetsahna asunun alu chungah atah-un ahi.
Hiche pet chun ama toh tha khat’in gucha michom mi ni khat ajet lamah, khat avei lamah thingpel’ah akhen beh-un ahi.
Chuin ahung le ache le avah le jousen akhasuh khumun ajah a,
“Nanghouin susea ni thuma sadoh kit, nangma kihuhhing tangem; nangma Pathen Chapa nahile thingpel’a konin hung kumlhan,” atiuvin a-el el’in ahouvun ahi.
Thempu pipui hon jong danthu sun ho le upa ho toh chutima chun totnopnan abolun,
“Aman midang ahuhhing jin ama akihuhhing theipoi. Ama Israelte lengpa ahi, tun thingpel’a konin hung kumlha tem hen, chutile tahsan unge.
Aman Pathen aging chan ahi; Pathenin adei ahile tun huhhing hen; ijeh-inem itile aman, ‘Pathen Chapa kahi,’ ati,” atiuvin ahi.
Chule amatoh thingpel’a kikhetbeh tha gucha michomte ni jong chun chutobangma chun ahouse lhonin ahi.
Chuin nidan gup’a pat nidan ko geiyin gam jouse chungah mu athimtan ahi.
Chuin nidan ko donin Jesun, “Eli, Eli, lema sabachthani,” tin hapen in apengin ahi. Hichu “Ka-Pathen, kaPathen, ibola neilha hitam!” ti na ahi.
Chukoma ding ho lah a abang bangin chutia ati chu ajauvin, “Hichepan Elijah akouve,” atiuvin ahi.
Chupettah chun alah uva khat alhaijel’in twichop phon khat alan lengpitwi thuh ade lhop’in peng tenggolleh a atah-in agah donsah-in ahi.
Ahin adang ho chun, “Limsah hih-un, Elijah ahuhhinga hunga hung hih am, veu hite,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin Jesu hapenin apengin alhagao alhadoh tan ahi.
Chuin veuvin houina pondal len chu achunga pat anoi geiyin a-eh lha paiyin keh ni akisotan ahi; chule ling akihot’in, song akeh gamtan ahi.
Chule lhankhuh ho akihongin a-ihmu mitheng ho long tamtah kaithouvin aumin ahi;
chule ama thokit nung chun amaho chu lhankhuh a konin apotdoh-un khopi thenga ache lut’un mi tamtah akimusah uvin ahi.
Chuin sepai ja lamkai le aumpi Jesu ngah a pang ho chun ling kihot le thilsoh um chanje chu amu’vin akichata lheh jengun, “Hichepa hi Pathen Chapa tahbeh mong ahi,” atitauvin ahi.
Chule Galilee gama kona Jesu nung hinjui ajenlea pang numei tamtah aumun, amaho chun galkanga pangin ave jingun ahi.
Alah uva chun Magdalene Mariam le Jacob le Joseph nu Mariam chule Zebedee chapa teni nu aumun ahi.
Chuin nilhah ahi phat’in Jesu seijuiya pang Arimathea khoa amin Joseph atiu mihaotah khat Pilate henga ahungin Jesu long chu athum in ahi.
Hichun Pilate chun peh dingin thu apetan ahi.
Chuin Joseph chun along chu alan tupat ponnem ngimseh chan atomin, song alaihom ama lhan thah sunga chun alupsah-in,
lhan kot’a chun song lentah khat a tang lut’in achemangtan ahi.
Chule Magdalene Mariam le Mariam chom nu chu hikoma chun aum lhonin lhan maiya chun atou jingun ahi.
Ajingin, hichu kigot ni nung ni ahin, thempu pipui ho le Pharisee ho Pilate hengah akikhomun ajah a,
“Kapu, hiche milhem chapa chun ahin laiyin, ‘Ni thum jou le thoukit ding kahi,’ ati chu tun kalunguva alange.

Hijeh chun ni thum geiya alhan ngah ding thu pen; ajo le aseijuite hungun tin gumang un tin, miho jah a, ‘Athi lah a konin athou kit tai,’ tiget’un te; chutile suh khel masah sanga suh khel nunung chu set chehna hiding ahi,” atiuvin ahi.
Pilate’in ajah uva, “Nanghon santri hon khat naneiyu chu; cheuvin lang na-nga thei theiyin ga-nga phatsah tauvin,” ati.
Chuin amaho angah ding santri hon chutoh alhonun song chunga chun mohor anamun lhan chu phatah-in angasah tauvin ahi.
Chuin cholngah ni kichaiya hapta kipat ni masani khovah then thenin Magdalene Mariam le Mariam chom nu chu lhan ve ding chun ahung lhonin ahi.
Chule veuvin, ling hahon akihottan ahi; ijeh-inem itile Pakai Vantil vana konin a hung kumlhan song chu atangdoh in achungah atouvin ahi.
Avouso chu kolphet toh abangin aponsil chu buhbang bangin abangin ahi;
chule ama kichat chun angah ho akihot akihot’un athia toh abangjeng un ahi.
Ahin hiche Vantil chun numei ho chu ahinhouvin ajah uva, “Nangho kicha hih-un, ijeh-inem itile thingpel’a kithat Jesu chu naholu ahi, kahenai.
Ama hikoma aumtapoi: ijeh-inem itile aman asei bang chun athoudoh tai. Hungun lang Pakai lupna hung vetauvin.

Chule nangho cheloiyun lang aseijuite ho jah a hiche hi gaseiyun. ‘Ama athi lah a konin athoudoh tai; chule veuvin, Galilee gamlamah nama sanguvah achei; chukoma chun nanghon ama namu dingu ahi,’ gatiuvin; veuvin, najah uva kaseitai,” ati.
Chuin amaho kichat toh gomin hapan akipah-un lhan phunga kon chun achedoh loiyun aseijuite henga thulhut ding chun alhaijel tauvin ahi.
Chuin veuvin, Jesun amaho chu akimupin ajah uva, “Damsel’un,” ati. Hichun amahon aheng ajonun akeng atuh-un chibai aboh tauvin ahi.
Hichun Jesun ajah uva, “Kicha hih-un, cheuvin kasopite jah a gaseiyun, amaho Galilee gam lama cheu hen, chukoma chu amahon eimu dingu ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin amaho acheu chun santria ding ho abang bang khopi sunga ahungun thusoh um chanjouse chu thempu pipui ho heng ahung lhut’un ahi.
Chuin amaho upa ho toh akikhomun akihoutoh jouvun sepai ho chu sum tamtah apeuvin ajah uva,
“Ka-ihmut lanuvin aseijuite ahungun agumang tauve,” tiuvin.
Hiche thu hi gamvaipon ajah a ahile keihon ama houjol’ung ting nangho lung olmo sah pouvinge,” atiuvin ahi.
Hichun amahon sum chu akilah-un ahil bangu chun aboltauvin ahi; chule hiche thu chu Juda miho lah a akiseison sonin tugeiyin aumin ahi.
Chujouvin aseijuite som le khat chu Galilee gama Jesun atepnau mol’a chun achetauvin ahi.
Chuin ama amu phat’un chibai aboh-un, ahivangin abang bangin aging chapouvin ahi.
Chuin Jesu ahenguva ahungin amaho chu ahouvin ajah uva, “Van a le leiya thuneina jouse keima eikipea ahitai.
Hichejeh chun nangho cheuvin, namtin a mi jouse seijuiyin gasemun, a-Pa, a-Cha, chule Lhagao Theng min’ah amaho chu Baptize gabol’un;
chule keiman nangho kapeh thujouse hi aboncha anit dinguvin gahil’un; chule veuvin, vannoi leiset kichai ni geiyin keiman nangho kaumpi jing nauve,” ati.
